name: NDTC Live Training Team
subject: New Year, New YOU!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| [ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1d1dQMfzConrUHV-Nrle9HQeGVW_UVQ3g3snKfkvM7w)
---
Peter — Do you have a New Years’ resolution to sign up for _more_ virtual live trainings? Well, you’re in luck because we have lots coming up in 2022! **⇨ First up is**[**So You Want to Run for Office?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1d1dQMfzConrUHV-Nrle9HQeGVW_UVQ3g3snKfkvM7w)**on Tuesday, January 4 at 1pm ET.** New year, new you, new choices! There’s a lot to consider when running for office. 2022 is a midterm election year and we’re here to help figure out if running for office is right for you. In this training, you’ll learn about the process of running for office, what you should research for your race, and even practice sharing the news with friends and family! | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1d1dQMfzConrUHV-Nrle9HQeGVW_UVQ3g3snKfkvM7w)
---

* * *

**⇨ Next, there’s**[**Running in a Red District**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GMPDRbb8x83BbiDH-MeJMNVGCmGEFfWXjABhf9LYpyc)**on Tuesday, January 4 at 8pm ET.**
No matter the position, every role in a campaign is expected to connect with voters. And it’s all the more critical in a red area or district. We have you covered in how to approach this kind of voter outreach.
Tune into this training to learn more about understanding the importance of direct voter contact and the components of effective persuasion conversations.
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GMPDRbb8x83BbiDH-MeJMNVGCmGEFfWXjABhf9LYpyc)
---

* * *

**⇨ Then, we have**[**What is a Democratic Precinct Chair**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..59tVKXotVq_eZ0Tt94qY8X0HekxW95bIPmBT_lpeINs)**on Thursday, January 6 at 1pm ET.**
A Precinct Chair isn’t usually what comes to mind when most people think of campaigns, but it’s still an essential role in your local Democratic Party!
Our team of experts will run through and discuss Precinct Chair responsibilities, non-electoral organizing, and tactics to maintaining and engaging supporters even after Election Day. Join us to learn more about this role in your community!
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..59tVKXotVq_eZ0Tt94qY8X0HekxW95bIPmBT_lpeINs)
---
Can’t wait to see you there!!
— NDTC Live Training Team

name: Republican Strategy Updates
subject: Hold my eggnog
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You need to read this before it’s too late
Peter - This is URGENT

The DNC has a new strategy, and it could really hurt us if our counter campaign isn’t successful.

[**We will be running campaigns against Democrats in key battle ground races around the country.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d09f700081fe4749aa29948601086541&_e=bKmnm759QJCm3tj1B4LiamB26kAOaxoVlISls0J1NjaIPOcfUJuQdsSrTB32wGQyzevNw6xg2ro_hwLZApmbMemFKCqAgbcTqHd8mXYxY1ns6zEGvLygn_tTtOHlWptyCcZHpCT-FugjPSFyySDg2QtV6cyFE_NH4yYtwMCKklyDF4AjPsrCrJ1uIM-3huhIxUQ4VCvNUAP0cAwwdg9dtwuf7DXnreT6pUkEY7iV0666NGgn64BQcQSVPcOiYSznU4_Y0WMytRgUmjmLRkg3yemWwezHhB52_yLc1_s9EGU8pL61VPvSez-FBI5nNSzxyXeXm4zRBtWfaIIBqlUK8xbwN8hW2IjzwnNuizyhcfZ5RQWNw48tt6liNBbZRMqXXPdtObW8EBS6c9CrG3BAU7eLYGmnFlxU1fI-oQeCKSUYpUAJpuhUozqdxIBF2_JEcw3TCo2Q_HIhwNoHUqU3nw%3D%3D)

[**The thing is, we might have to keep spending if we are going to play placeholder until the primaries are held in 2022. It’s not going to be cheap, but it’s a necessity.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d09f700081fe4749aa29948601086541&_e=bKmnm759QJCm3tj1B4LiamB26kAOaxoVlISls0J1NjaIPOcfUJuQdsSrTB32wGQyzevNw6xg2ro_hwLZApmbMemFKCqAgbcTqHd8mXYxY1ns6zEGvLygn_tTtOHlWptyCcZHpCT-FugjPSFyySDg2QtV6cyFE_NH4yYtwMCKklyDF4AjPsrCrJ1uIM-3huhIxUQ4VCvNUAP0cAwwdg9dtwuf7DXnreT6pUkEY7iV067UF6TdqH8IquxWAjYfjHSEcYq704cnUhcvWVk1SPVBYZMa1PYtXoAOoCPzzq6VuGv02f1zIJ7NEXmZWwJr4TCKrGw0w-88O7eAsc9TEKIlmaKZGcNbPIR9eCEjWXVF54jVfvGKvivah41vh85-svPPi-zxqJwN4wCusBcuJW8KFLtiDXuhk3ikVqJugArf6gnQnKg4jBg8KTytDtB3dVF6fzUWo7RPHTWH5xl2uYU_AQ%3D%3D)

[**DON’T LET DEMS RUN US OUT -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d09f700081fe4749aa29948601086541&_e=bKmnm759QJCm3tj1B4LiamB26kAOaxoVlISls0J1NjaIPOcfUJuQdsSrTB32wGQyzevNw6xg2ro_hwLZApmbMemFKCqAgbcTqHd8mXYxY1ns6zEGvLygn_tTtOHlWptyCcZHpCT-FugjPSFyySDg2QtV6cyFE_NH4yYtwMCKklyDF4AjPsrCrJ1uIM-3huhIxUQ4VCvNUAP0cAwwdg9dtwuf7DXnreT6pUkEY7iV065iFXsqJ-WLEWekPV6DJVgxRBaYlwaN13LEW3MfBvWdtziXg4-eF52BswjU1H5E312P5DPYaJPRkrR8LcnUFu9DiHS3NSbe79dbcifla4OhE22AMDIpaMpfPiggNO1r-uQ_7dd0cnTwkCHUSdeZXAWY6Mg9n2tIj6B7PG6Ng_oTd7Edcw8HT0kYCKH5wKD_0JcSceT2tlVW9KnzssprFPq28bDl4flIRVdZsJ1i9NrAfA%3D%3D)
[**HELP THE NRSC -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d09f700081fe4749aa29948601086541&_e=bKmnm759QJCm3tj1B4LiamB26kAOaxoVlISls0J1NjaIPOcfUJuQdsSrTB32wGQyzevNw6xg2ro_hwLZApmbMemFKCqAgbcTqHd8mXYxY1ns6zEGvLygn_tTtOHlWptyCcZHpCT-FugjPSFyySDg2QtV6cyFE_NH4yYtwMCKklyDF4AjPsrCrJ1uIM-3huhIxUQ4VCvNUAP0cAwwdg9dtwuf7DXnreT6pUkEY7iV067VlYAp8mXmqusm-B4_T71fwhoK6B8vTwvs7_SEEWVmbKpBtiK_aiN_A-Wd4epi97S_KHrQgNi5sDxCN-Xfd5PFzUxN8A8CkRp1Pedy3ej26PqCgdT1O_uPsyWr9L2oeK_4IlIBNDkPMiXqJ-2ZmpQxjUoggKtKMP01ev-cSPrmVVVY5j-pbjSFLohMQHpV6aOZKj9kFcvRrUk-CZ9rYgIpDcdBYjeeRWKMio96E6niPw%3D%3D)
Here’s the deal: They know which seats we’re going after and they’re helping their vulnerable incumbents raise big money.

We can’t let these Democrat candidates rake in major fundraising dollars. We MUST start letting their voters know about their disastrous records NOW.

That’s where you come in Peter. We need your immediate contribution to keep this fund filled so we never have to come down.

There is absolutely NO TIME TO WASTE because the longer we wait to hit them, the more entrenched they’ll become. That’s right Peter, if we can’t secure enough money this week to run our campaigns; they win, and we lose.

We’re taking this week by week. One ad at a time. [**Won’t you chip in one or two dollars right now to make sure our pro-Republican campaigns can continue?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d09f700081fe4749aa29948601086541&_e=bKmnm759QJCm3tj1B4LiamB26kAOaxoVlISls0J1NjaIPOcfUJuQdsSrTB32wGQyzevNw6xg2ro_hwLZApmbMemFKCqAgbcTqHd8mXYxY1ns6zEGvLygn_tTtOHlWptyCcZHpCT-FugjPSFyySDg2QtV6cyFE_NH4yYtwMCKklyDF4AjPsrCrJ1uIM-3huhIxUQ4VCvNUAP0cAwwdg9dtwuf7DXnreT6pUkEY7iV065XZSf8TY7bPc-uhKOEdNS9wFSRD1dzg5-HPFoQuzfzhea-HpAkzZkIx2ytdAHTWKgK3e5Fs7-Ykf1GAznkDO6D70JlDMX_j28qv7Y4ZjvsQrDTsCWMOQLrWfK1AQpLD6av1D069WZj1Ra1xjaz8ngOO1bxevDKzkoobjDAG5DD4tRqWnnE3uCrz0fnZ34cHYQIkKwoSe62Mb-9MjOqTV5jHgHI6GdoKfpcOJGrq6yI-w%3D%3D)

[**If you don’t want to see the Democrats secure their holds in important battleground races, you need to send in whatever you can today to support our campaign.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d09f700081fe4749aa29948601086541&_e=bKmnm759QJCm3tj1B4LiamB26kAOaxoVlISls0J1NjaIPOcfUJuQdsSrTB32wGQyzevNw6xg2ro_hwLZApmbMemFKCqAgbcTqHd8mXYxY1ns6zEGvLygn_tTtOHlWptyCcZHpCT-FugjPSFyySDg2QtV6cyFE_NH4yYtwMCKklyDF4AjPsrCrJ1uIM-3huhIxUQ4VCvNUAP0cAwwdg9dtwuf7DXnreT6pUkEY7iV064LWiaoKAYU4UDzmuAVcJSs62B_OdkVzZYIEGmU6U9vz-KMa2wCc8rrAbhIeWFpfgQpY12QC9d-ZukcPje7XNw_-svOpMen6fKr8LCzVuGHWfjr3aGjSmuj5GmpXXc93CEeel2uxnNQ5RJeQRQcJnQ9EBJ1NI7pmhEEa3gfWCmvplRZxhkkeoCtZLYUrXI6-TCzDtw_WcoAnt6fxIqa16w0OyXuq4H0M3En9W-1GRev_Q%3D%3D)

[**DON’T LET DEMS RUN US OUT -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d09f700081fe4749aa29948601086541&_e=bKmnm759QJCm3tj1B4LiamB26kAOaxoVlISls0J1NjaIPOcfUJuQdsSrTB32wGQyzevNw6xg2ro_hwLZApmbMemFKCqAgbcTqHd8mXYxY1ns6zEGvLygn_tTtOHlWptyCcZHpCT-FugjPSFyySDg2QtV6cyFE_NH4yYtwMCKklyDF4AjPsrCrJ1uIM-3huhIxUQ4VCvNUAP0cAwwdg9dtwuf7DXnreT6pUkEY7iV067bFfKTRvtT7fqHOoZ1aYoDX2Hkl5u7H4hzX-PO-tcVYjdqUK8TzAXlMd4Ri2t1ehIS2Mn4WYGsAfYMPccMRZq05jabziQtZi5LolEPvRkBRuVnW_E4vfvVRo0y5PFsHRA4puKYRBUyITO1Ab9Jn2R2BUe236OQ_6aqMUHQl6YpIA2OnFWbKzP5IVDxz8h6HVV4G0w_qw8DgH5LyqkaOc7zUz6JVlGEnbs1ui6UH0Yd5g%3D%3D)
[**HELP THE NRSC -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d09f700081fe4749aa29948601086541&_e=bKmnm759QJCm3tj1B4LiamB26kAOaxoVlISls0J1NjaIPOcfUJuQdsSrTB32wGQyzevNw6xg2ro_hwLZApmbMemFKCqAgbcTqHd8mXYxY1ns6zEGvLygn_tTtOHlWptyCcZHpCT-FugjPSFyySDg2QtV6cyFE_NH4yYtwMCKklyDF4AjPsrCrJ1uIM-3huhIxUQ4VCvNUAP0cAwwdg9dtwuf7DXnreT6pUkEY7iV064K6pNW-6zBip-LKVyiF1BVGzVXAEmiPvuenMQJ41U0ELsTbHqhMXx2P6QVoVHTPBYDR008FkoC-JC3G3ZeWc9jBF5YnpMARVW8L1Osx6wgaknOmwxafrQGiILUr3MPvAO0WDIKh27496Cms0YYnFUXq_oMgQM3fz08rKR7FrnCC44LAWsIWS84uMIk1ZtIsntl9U1jkmMT8Kvpnkpx2DGEBTWYo-zIfOpn0bEJU9pLpg%3D%3D)

Here’s the deal: They know which seats we’re going after and they’re helping their vulnerable incumbents raise big money. We can’t let these Democrat candidates rake in major fundraising dollars. We MUST start letting their voters know about their disastrous records NOW. That’s where you come in Peter. We need your immediate contribution to keep this fund filled so we never have to come down. There is absolutely NO TIME TO WASTE because the longer we wait to hit them, the more entrenched they’ll become. That’s right Peter, if we can’t secure enough money this week to run our campaigns; they win, and we lose. We’re taking this week by week. One ad at a time. Thank you, Team NRSC If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Friend,

Our campaign ended 2021 on a strong note, and we have positioned ourselves to carry that momentum into 2022 and Take Back the U.S. Senate in 2022.

The worst thing we could do is start 2022 slow and allow our momentum to fade. **If we’re going to save our children from CRT, secure our Southern Border, and get tough on China we’ve got to Take Back the U.S. Senate and that’s what I’m fighting every single day to do.**

I’m counting on your help to do just that and I need it fast. Will you rush an emergency donation to help my campaign kickoff 2022 and keep up all of the great 2021 momentum to Put America First?

name: Firearm Man
subject: Following you to your car...
body:
Imagine you leave the grocery store on a quiet Wednesday night...
---
| If you like firearms, then you're in the right place. Remember you can _[unsubscribe](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/175/56327/beb9f15bae0c05e80f0f64bf0dd2da8aab4689c2/bd901ca8f47f26e6639fa5d6be9eeace55060ec9)_ here at any time. [](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/175/56327/f6928556da108feeaf98575ace18b16cb0f29fbf/bd901ca8f47f26e6639fa5d6be9eeace55060ec9) **January 3rd, 2022** [](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/175/56327/f6928556da108feeaf98575ace18b16cb0f29fbf/bd901ca8f47f26e6639fa5d6be9eeace55060ec9) | Imagine you leave the grocery store on a quiet Wednesday night...

There’s a homeless man smoking outside the sliding doors. His hair is gross and the scabs on his face are **pussy and yellow.**

You see he’s about to ask for something, so you start walking faster

**_But so does he._**

Suddenly he’s in your face making demands.

You can tell he’s drunk.

And when you don’t give him what he wants... **he decides he’s going to take it.**

You have two choices for what happens next:

1. Give him all your cash and hope he shows you mercy...

OR...

2. Use [this “little black tube”](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/175/56327/7bf12b828731d1c80a755a4d52c1b02867709eb6/bd901ca8f47f26e6639fa5d6be9eeace55060ec9) to leave him writhing on the ground in agony.

The “tube” I’m talking about looks totally innocent...

But it’s powerful enough to shatter the rhythm of a grown man’s heart -- ** _even make him lose control of his bodily functions._**

Aside from a gun, it’s the most effective defense tool I’ve found.

Best of all...

The company who makes them is currently **giving away a small number for FREE today.**

They’re doing this in response to the surge in violent crime in America right now... and due to the fact experts believe it will only increase as we get closer to the holidays.

They don’t have too many to give away though.

**_(next 88 people are guaranteed to get one Free last I checked)_**

And these normally sell for 60 bucks, so I know they’ll be gone fast.

[Get yours here FREE, while they’re still available.](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/175/56327/7bf12b828731d1c80a755a4d52c1b02867709eb6/bd901ca8f47f26e6639fa5d6be9eeace55060ec9)

**Thank You.**
---

| | | **BREAKING NEWS**
_**Leading Political News Source Lists Florida as Top Race in Determining Senate Majority**_
_Fellow Conservative – a FOURTH major news source is now confirming they believe that Florida could fall to the Democrats this year. This would inevitably ruin Trump’s legacy and eliminate all of Republicans' hard work over the past decade._

And to make matters worse, this new ranking was released ONE WEEK before Marco Rubio’s biggest deadline of 2021, Fellow Conservative, and if he fails to meet his goal, he may never catch up.

So here are the facts one more time:
* _Fox News_ said Marco’s race could be the most expensive ever.
* _CNN_ moved his race up on their list of Top 10 seats likely to flip and said his race is the "most important race for the Dems."
* _Roll Call_ labeled him the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for reelection.
* And now _The Hill_ is saying Florida will decide the Senate.

We need you to listen to us, Fellow Conservative. If Dems expand their total control of the Senate, we can kiss Trump’s legacy goodbye! **[Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-37feg-1rkkd-4qqlpo4/ "Please rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before midnight >>")**

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Happy New Year and Thank You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
First, I want to take a moment to thank you for your support in helping us reach our important end-of-year goal and be on track to defend this Maryland Senate seat in November. Your support is what powers our campaign, and I’m so grateful to be in the fight for progress alongside you. As we launch this consequential new year, I want to wish you and yours a year of progress, healing and community. In the face of the divisions and extremism we are experiencing in the political sphere, it’s more important than ever that we persevere in the work to advance our common humanity and empower empathy over apathy, hope over despair, and goodwill over spite. For my part, I will do everything I can in 2022 to break through the choking gridlock in the Senate in order to protect our democracy and advance the solutions our country so badly needs. As always, thank you for being a partner in the work to protect our American experiment. Happy New Year! Chris

body:

**Happy New Year!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40320181/323800637/1378773197?refcode=EM_C_220103NewYear_N_SB_90DO_3_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2E3OGNhMC1hMTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cikxJypAJCxVhawek0Mvz40841_EHTPepGAWZSiBW-o=) 2021 was great, but I have a feeling 2022 will be nothing short of better. We’re making sure we’re doing everything we can to keep our country on the right track into the new year and continue building on our successes.

On behalf of my entire team, best wishes for a bright and happy 2022, and thank you for all your support in 2021.

Best,

Shontel Brown |
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

| | | Happy New Year, Patriot!

I wanted to reach out and say thank you for everything you've done for our cause.

Thanks to you, we are one step closer to Firing Pelosi and taking back our Conservative Majority.

Thanks to you, 23 Democrats have retired because they're scared of the red wave that's coming.

Thanks to you, we're at a pivotal moment in turning this country around.

I know I can count on you, Patriot, which is why I'd like to offer you the exclusive opportunity to be our very first donor of 2022.

This is the year that will change everything. This is the year that we FIRE Pelosi, reclaim Congress, and turn our country around -- and I'd like YOU to be the one to kick us off.

Leader Kevin McCarthy

I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40325419/323820574/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjdlNmVmZi1hYTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kGMGcsJTNXon3gGm2zspe9o9I55vq9gtKkXGX8dy9s0=&emci=558eb473-9362-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cf7e6eff-aa6c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=15639879)

Friends -- it wouldn't feel right if we didn't start off the New Year with a massive THANKS to you, our amazing supporters.

When I decided to embark on this journey last summer, I did not know what to expect. I just knew that our community needed a representative who is going to put our families and communities at the center of the debate in Washington.

I could not have imagined that I would be able to have this type of support backing me.

I am overwhelmed and grateful. With each deadline goal we have set, you have helped us do far better than expected. With your support, we are going to achieve great things this upcoming year and so I say **_thanks._**

Thank you for believing in this campaign. **Now let's get to work.**

name: Keystone Progress
subject: Hope for the future.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We're feeling hopeful as we welcome in this brand New Year. We know if we work together and stay focused, we will see progress in our mission in 2022.

We're collaborating with incredible folks and organizations who are experts in their fields, building strong and powerful coalitions to pull and lift up our strengths to make real change. We are empowering and training organizers to mobilize voters so that everyone's voices and votes are counted.

Other reasons to be hopeful include the amazing progress we've seen, not only in our work on the ground, but in our government. In Pittsburgh, we elected Ed Gainey, who will become our first Black mayor today. He is MORE than ready to create a more equitable, safer, and diverse Pittsburgh. He will be sworn in TODAY virtually. You can livestream it at 1 p.m. on the city’s YouTube channel , Facebook , and Twitter, and watch it on the city's TV channel.

[https://www.post-gazette.com/local/2022/01/02/Mayor-Elect-Ed-Gainey-making-Pittsburgh-a-safe-affordable-diverse-city-equitable-development-education-and-workforce-development-infrastructure-and-environment-and-community-health-and-safety/stories/202201020020]

[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-YfIv9wvBjGT3LMxo9hLoQ]

[https://www.facebook.com/city.of.pittsburgh/]

[https://twitter.com/Pittsburgh]

Yes, there is more work to do, but we're prepared to do it, do it well, and with hope and joy.

Thank you for standing with us as we build up this beautiful movement! Please sign up today to volunteer [https://secure.everyaction.com/uzGCPSTbqE-PPaK8Nmgqjw2?contactdata=pbRMUsZXKK%2FzBvJ7ynp4lnzYvemSPGViEkCczr9KESdWYoI%2FZ3wrfLLwpvNm%2BmWbYzxei%2Bp0OgjO0f%2FPXKjATW2ltGWRTCYgYxRgkpgivsbdKyuIspHWrepVkD66a4IoIu6JYTa7%2B1ZS28jH2MMjyQ%3D%3D] or donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=010322] .

Wishing you the happiest New year.

Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

name: Matt Castelli
subject: Happy New Year!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
I just wanted to say thank you for help and Happy New Year!
| Team,

I just wanted to say thank you for help and Happy New Year! Thanks to your support we met our final FEC deadline goal before the 2022 election year!

We have a long road ahead of us, but I’m confident that as we continue to grow our grassroots team, we will have what it takes to defeat Elise Stefanik in November.

Thank you again for helping us ring in the New Year on the right foot!

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Top 5 liars in the media
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157970:JqxJ6uENu:m:1:3298722022:52FAD83C482C85DB27E9287ADFC0EA9E:r)
Peter,

It's no secret the mainstream media is occupied by merchants of lies, Leftwing activists, and corrupt power hungry radicals. The Media Research Center (MRC) is the only conservative non-profit dedicated to exposing the Leftwing media and holding them accountable.

MRC monitors the Fake News media outlets to record their lies, expose them, and spread the truth to the American people. **I decided to rank the TOP 5 Liars in the Leftwing-Media and show you how the Media Research Center is fighting back!**

Here are the TOP 5 Liars in the Leftwing-Media (I will highlight the worst parts for you):
1. **Chris Cuomo and CNN:** As the leader of the Fake News Industry, CNN produces some of the most despicable and unethical liars in the media today. MRC recently helped expose Chris Cuomo for aiding his brother's (fmr. NY Governor Andrew Cuomo) sexual harassment allegations.

CNN and Chris Cuomo used their positions to lie about the story, keep Andrew Cuomo in power, conceal his criminal activity, and keep pushing lies about the COVID pandemic

[**You can help the Media Research Center expose more liars like CNN by making a donation here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157970:JqxJ6uENu:m:1:3298722022:52FAD83C482C85DB27E9287ADFC0EA9E:r)

2. **Jen Psaki:** Joe Biden's Liar-in-Chief, Jen Psaki, is a state sponsored propagandist whose sole job is to cover up the administration's failures and silence conservatives in the media.

MRC records each of her statements, identifies inconsistencies & lies, and holds her accountable to her own words. Jen Psaki attempted to sweep Biden's TOTAL FAILURE in Afghanistan under the rug... MRC refused to let that happen. _We sounded the alarm and let the American people know the truth_.

[**Help the Media Research Center hold the Biden administration accountable to their failures by donating here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157970:JqxJ6uENu:m:1:3298722022:52FAD83C482C85DB27E9287ADFC0EA9E:r)

3. **Joy Reid:** MSNBC's Joy Reid the Leftwing Media's attack dog for all of their favorite causes.

She uses her position in the media to compare abortion restrictions to "Shariah Law," cancel and silence people she dislikes by falsely accusing them of racism, and promote Critical Race Theory.

Joy Reid is NOT a journalist. MRC is fighting back by exposing her lies to the American people. [**Support the MRC 's battle against MSNBC by donating here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157970:JqxJ6uENu:m:1:3298722022:52FAD83C482C85DB27E9287ADFC0EA9E:r)

4. **AP "Fact-checkers":** The Leftwing Media has hired a small army of "Fact Checkers" to present their radically biased opinions as facts on all news stories. This is a dangerous new trick the Fake News industry has created to build a false sense of credibility for their political agendas.

Big Tech companies such as Facebook and Twitter have also hired "Fact Checkers" to review content they simply disagree with in an effort to silence conservatives, Trump supporters, and America-First patriots.

The Media Research Center is exposing these "Fact Checkers" and demanding an end to this rigged system. [**Donate to support our efforts here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157970:JqxJ6uENu:m:1:3298722022:52FAD83C482C85DB27E9287ADFC0EA9E:r)

5. **Rachel Maddow:** MSNBC doesn't even bother trying to present themselves as an unbiased news organization anymore. Rachel Maddow is the official spokesperson for socialism, the Woke agenda, and the Radical Left.

MRC is holding her accountable for failing to report the truth, and lying to the American people in order to force her sick and twisted ideology down our throats.

Peter, this list could easily be 80 pages long.

The Leftwing Media is one of the greatest threats to our Republic, free speech, our values, the Constitution, and our liberty.

I have dedicated my life's work to combating Fake News and defending free speech. The Media Research Center has successfully shattered trust in the leftist media... but our fight isn't over.

The Media Research Center must now fight "Fact Checkers," Big Tech censorship, rabidly pro-socialist reporters, and outright liars in the mainstream media. I am counting on your help to WIN this battle.

My goal is to raise $50,000 to fund MRC's efforts... We are going to WAR with CNN, MSNBC, and the entire Fake News industry. Please use one of the links below to join our fight:

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157970:JqxJ6uENu:m:1:3298722022:52FAD83C482C85DB27E9287ADFC0EA9E:r)

Defeating the Fake News empire will not be easy.

But we must fight.

The Leftwing Media is mobilizing to influence our elections, force Critical Race Theory into our classrooms, enact socialism, pass AOC's "Green New Deal", and destroy our country.

The Media Research Center is on the frontlines, exposing lies in the media, taking down corrupt "journalists" like Chris Cuomo, and spreading the truth in the media.

The best part? _We are winning_.

The MRC has a proven formula to expose the truth and hold the media accountable.

But the ugly truth is... We will fail without your help.

Unlike the media, we do not receive millions of dollars of funding from George Soros or Bill Gates. The Media Research Center is funded by patriotic Americans who wish to defend our values, fight for free speech, and protect the future of our Republic for the next generation.

[**Please join the Media Research Center by making a donation of $10, $50, $100, $250, $500 or ANY amount by clicking here. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157970:JqxJ6uENu:m:1:3298722022:52FAD83C482C85DB27E9287ADFC0EA9E:r)

Thank you for everything you do for liberty and for our country.

Brent Bozell
President & Founder of MRC

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system October 16, 2021.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJqxJ6uENu). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJqxJ6uENu)

name: Ann Coulter
subject: College campuses have gone insane
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59155188:JNCeLuE0N:m:1:3253819041:A20B09942A98D4CFFDC4B76C4BCDF687:r) Peter, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation's immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called "birthplace of the free speech movement." As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn't stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I'm not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59155188:JNCeLuE0N:m:1:3253819041:A20B09942A98D4CFFDC4B76C4BCDF687:r) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump's arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there's no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech - and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched - because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I 've given up hope, faithful conservative, there's a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see: _Campus Reform_.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59155188:JNCeLuE0N:m:1:3253819041:A20B09942A98D4CFFDC4B76C4BCDF687:r) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line - Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals' indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you - yes, you! - which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59155188:JNCeLuE0N:m:1:3253819041:A20B09942A98D4CFFDC4B76C4BCDF687:r) And to sweeten the pot - when you give $100 or more to LI's Campus Reform, I'll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59155188:JNCeLuE0N:m:1:3253819041:A20B09942A98D4CFFDC4B76C4BCDF687:r) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they'd **" lock them up" for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a "neo-fascist" and "Nazi." Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives "vile, racist idiots" and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI's Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform's exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform 's quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform's fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won't be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute 's Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don't lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59155188:JNCeLuE0N:m:1:3253819041:A20B09942A98D4CFFDC4B76C4BCDF687:r) Friend, let's make 'em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59155188:JNCeLuE0N:m:1:3253819041:A20B09942A98D4CFFDC4B76C4BCDF687:r) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI 's Campus Reform, I'll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_.** It's just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59155188:JNCeLuE0N:m:1:3253819041:A20B09942A98D4CFFDC4B76C4BCDF687:r)**Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59155188:JNCeLuE0N:m:1:3253819041:A20B09942A98D4CFFDC4B76C4BCDF687:r)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

name: Rep. Demings
subject: This is my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I hope you'll give it a read
| | |
---
Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've _got_ to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked _hard._ And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had _faith. _I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40327495/323832782/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2043-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkZjJjOS1iMzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J65sCHcXi1kRuIKa_vm3jCJN1S76FxMY6K3moZ0ExD0=)
That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – _never_ tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.
**[I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40327496/323832783/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2043-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkZjJjOS1iMzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J65sCHcXi1kRuIKa_vm3jCJN1S76FxMY6K3moZ0ExD0=)**
_Never tire._ These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.
_Never tire,_ I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I _never tire_ of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.
This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians.** ****I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.**
[**So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is** _resources._**The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40327497/323832784/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2043-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkZjJjOS1iMzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J65sCHcXi1kRuIKa_vm3jCJN1S76FxMY6K3moZ0ExD0=)
Thank you for being in this with me. _Never tire._

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40327498/323832785/1581265324?refcode=jtk2043-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkZjJjOS1iMzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J65sCHcXi1kRuIKa_vm3jCJN1S76FxMY6K3moZ0ExD0=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40327499/323832786/1804727444?refcode=jtk2043-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkZjJjOS1iMzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J65sCHcXi1kRuIKa_vm3jCJN1S76FxMY6K3moZ0ExD0=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40327500/323832787/-460395862?refcode=jtk2043-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkZjJjOS1iMzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J65sCHcXi1kRuIKa_vm3jCJN1S76FxMY6K3moZ0ExD0=&emci=3ae6b1e9-d768-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=8e9df2c9-b36c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40327501/323832788/-144803992?refcode=jtk2043-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkZjJjOS1iMzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J65sCHcXi1kRuIKa_vm3jCJN1S76FxMY6K3moZ0ExD0=&emci=3ae6b1e9-d768-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=8e9df2c9-b36c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3ae6b1e9-d768-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e/8e9df2c9-b36c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkZjJjOS1iMzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J65sCHcXi1kRuIKa_vm3jCJN1S76FxMY6K3moZ0ExD0=&id=123159867).
Val Demings for U.S. Senate

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Will 2022 be a Better Year Than 2021?
body:

body:
With your help, she can defeat Sen. Grassley
| ****| | ****

Hi Peter,

**This is Deb and Jerry Finkenauer – Abby's parents – writing to you.**
Firstly, we wanted to thank you for being part of Abby's grassroots team to win Iowa's Senate seat and defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley. It's going to take a lot of work, but when Abby sets her mind to something, she always gets it done. **With the right resources and the right team, she'll win this.**
Now when it comes to resources, we know Abby's up against the entire Republican establishment: Mitch McConnell's fundraising committees and super PACs, and the $30 million campaign war chest of the Senate Republicans. **With only 27% of Iowans reporting they want to reelect Sen. Grassley, national Republicans will spend heavily to keep Iowa red.**
What they don't realize yet is that Abby will outwork them every step of the way. We may not have been able to give our daughter a trust fund or write a six-figure check for college – and she doesn’t have millions in campaign cash like her opponent – but what we did give her was her work ethic. Abby's someone who sees work to be done and _does it_. She's unrelenting in her support of Iowa's working families, and that's the attitude she'll bring to the Senate.
**But to compete against the entire Republican establishment, to win this race, Abby is counting on unprecedented grassroots resources. That's why we're asking: Can you help Abby start January's fundraising off strong by making a contribution? **

clean_body: With your help, she can defeat Sen. Grassley | **| | Hi Peter, This is Deb and Jerry Finkenauer – Abby's parents – writing to you. Firstly, we wanted to thank you for being part of Abby's grassroots team to win Iowa's Senate seat and defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley. It's going to take a lot of work, but when Abby sets her mind to something, she always gets it done. With the right resources and the right team, she'll win this. Now when it comes to resources, we know Abby's up against the entire Republican establishment: Mitch McConnell's fundraising committees and super PACs, and the $30 million campaign war chest of the Senate Republicans. With only 27% of Iowans reporting they want to reelect Sen. Grassley, national Republicans will spend heavily to keep Iowa red. What they don't realize yet is that Abby will outwork them every step of the way. We may not have been able to give our daughter a trust fund or write a six-figure check for college – and she doesn’t have millions in campaign cash like her opponent – but what we did give her was her work ethic. Abby's someone who sees work to be done and does it. She's unrelenting in her support of Iowa's working families, and that's the attitude she'll bring to the Senate. But to compete against the entire Republican establishment, to win this race, Abby is counting on unprecedented grassroots resources. That's why we're asking: Can you help Abby start January's fundraising off strong by making a contribution? =** If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = So grateful for your support of our daughter. Thank you. Deb and Jerry Finkenauer (Abby's parents) = P.S. The above is a photo from a day that was very special to our family: walking into Abby's congressional office in Washington. We were her very first visitors. We can't wait to see her back on the Senate side getting work done for Iowans. = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States

Since I got to Washington, the radical left and their friends in Silicon Valley have done everything they can to shut me up: from censure votes, to suspending my accounts several times last year, to gerrymandering my district, to funding my liberal opponent, and lying about me in every media outlet who will print their false attacks against me. **I guess this means we 're winning when they don't take a day off from trying to stop me!** I am not afraid of the radical left, and it's clear they **WANT ME GONE**. That's why they're throwing everything at me, including the kitchen sink after I sounded the clarion call about their attempts to turn us from free citizens into socialist slaves. **They can't stop me from exposing their lies, but if you act now, we can show them how freedom-loving Americans won 't be intimidated by their tactics.** **[Help me put an end to the left's socialist agenda by donating at least $35 TODAY! name: ICYMI News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr8a3625sr2p0cg30f6qbh2dri0iolf1sjantue8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9h69pj6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2c8psfhb2c40r2pf7msur489544fkg3kebni788_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9h69pj6c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze5a2er0uvfllnfv91tsm4r5egs6mt6cbactjs68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9h69pj6c3h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

By reducing costs and rethinking learning processes, secondary educational systems should focus on new strategies: how, when, and where we learn. Simply put, if we all support learning, it's essential to support accessible and affordable higher education. But, the current way we implement and practice secondary education isn't sustainable. The purpose of a college degree or a vocational certificate is to demonstrate a person's knowledge, skill, and motivation to be a talented employee. Students can show these attributes _outside_ of the classroom. There are alternatives to attending a college, university, or vocational school for your entire degree, and there are alternatives to in-person learning. We need to reimagine the possibilities of unconventional learning. Students can practice education by focusing on learning beyond strictly credit hours in the classroom. Life experiences are just as critical. We need to allow learning outside of the four walls of a higher education institution in our trusted communities and at local businesses. We need to incorporate current technology to increase access to excellent teachers nationally and internationally. Higher education executive Adrian K. Haugabrook explains in a **[barrier-breaking Ted-talk](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40329938/323845640/1355470713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTM0ZWZkNC1iZjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d3pX7JugTiy8V1PhkmrPMaVWcUGXswpw_mWBR3ooN04=&emci=e9a885d6-bb6c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=3a34efd4-bf6c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=15167427#t-54917)** an innovative approach to expanding access to higher education by driving down costs and rethinking three key things: time, place, and how we learn. clean_body: I’m so glad to have you on our team. | = Hey all, Just had to take a quick minute to say thanks so much for your support over the last few days as our campaign worked to reach our end-of-year fundraising goal. We couldn’t have done it without you! Now, believe it or not, it’s an election year once again, and we couldn’t be more excited for what the next eleven months hold for Team Cranley. But 2022 is bigger than just us — in Ohio, offices at the municipal level, state legislative seats, congressional seats, and more are on the ballot in the midterms. And it’s up to all of us to make sure that Democrats win everywhere. = = Thanks so much for all your support in 2021. This year will be even bigger for our team, and I’m so grateful to have you with us. John = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

body:
Will you fill out our short survey? | | |
---
Hi there, friend. Now that the 2022 election cycle has officially begun, we're kicking our campaign into high gear. And that starts with hearing from you. **[Will you take a moment to fill out our short priorities survey? Your answers will help us focus on what matters most in this crucial race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40330297/323847501/-939336083?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmRhZmZlMS1jMTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K8XjySXnnv8hs9D2c4Fxk7ZInQyZmgkeLOCtP96__ww=&emci=98daffe1-c16c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=9bdaffe1-c16c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=5452893)** | | [Complete Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40330298/323847502/-939336083?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmRhZmZlMS1jMTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K8XjySXnnv8hs9D2c4Fxk7ZInQyZmgkeLOCtP96__ww=&emci=98daffe1-c16c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=9bdaffe1-c16c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=5452893)
---
While Republican super PACs are funneling dark money into our state in an attempt to buy this seat, Maggie is remaining focused on the priorities that matter most to Granite Staters and all Americans. That's why she wants to hear from you, friend.
**[Your feedback is vital to this people-powered campaign. So please take a minute (or two, tops!) and tell Maggie what matters to you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40330299/323847503/-939336083?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmRhZmZlMS1jMTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K8XjySXnnv8hs9D2c4Fxk7ZInQyZmgkeLOCtP96__ww=&emci=98daffe1-c16c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=9bdaffe1-c16c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=5452893)**
Thank you for your help.
– Team Maggie

clean_body: Peter, On behalf of all of us at Team Trish, please accept our heartfelt gratitude for your support and involvement. We're proud to be on this team with you and to build the organization to hold Ann Wagner accountable for failing her constituents since she was elected nearly one decade ago. From the MO State Council of Firefighters, who endorsed Trish last month, to a broad ideological range of voters and donors, we are putting together the coalition to fight for a true representative who cares about people and listens to voices across the political spectrum. Thank you for being a part of it. We're excited to continue building the team that is going to flip MO-02 blue next year. Sincerely, -Trish Gunby for Congress Team = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

Team, I wanted to reach out to wish you a very happy new year, and to thank you for all your support in 2021, especially in the final days leading up to our critical end-of-year goal last Friday. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we not only reached our fundraising goal — we blew it out of the water! **I can’t thank you enough for helping us end 2021 and start 2022 off strong.** A year ago, I never thought that I’d be running for Congress. As I reflect on the challenges and opportunities of 2021, I am so thankful for the love and support of friends, family, and the good people of NM-02. I’m running for Congress to give the people of this district the leadership they deserve, so we can all earn our fair share, access affordable health care, act on climate change, protect our democracy as we know it, and move our state forward. This is truly a people-powered campaign: **we now have nearly 1,500 donors** fueling our work to flip this House seat blue and unseat far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell. _Mil gracias_ for all you’ve done to help get us here. I’m so hopeful for what we’ll accomplish in the next eleven months leading up to the November election. _Si se puede!_ Wishing you health and goodwill in 2022. Saludos, Gabe PS — One of the best ways you can support our campaign this year is by making a recurring donation to fuel us through Election Day. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Will you stand with us as we expand our minimum wage campaigns? | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40330633/323849224/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzIxZmZjYi1jNTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QbHM0-EM4SVeW2t-4OKJGgZRlYXPrBwOi52JG0V8RYI=&emci=bbd41b7e-db68-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=cc21ffcb-c56c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=561582) | Team, 2022 is set to be a busy year — there’s no doubt about it. But before we dive into what campaigns and issues we’ll be tackling in this year’s midterms, we wanted to celebrate some of the victories supporters like you have helped us to accomplish since 2016. Many of the minimum wage ballot measure campaigns we’ve won included annual adjustments to wages based on economic factors like cost of living and inflation. **Thanks to your help, the lives of working families in eight states will be better this year because of the support you gave us.** **_Here’s what you helped us to achieve:_** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40330634/323849225/-1466770811?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzIxZmZjYi1jNTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QbHM0-EM4SVeW2t-4OKJGgZRlYXPrBwOi52JG0V8RYI=&emci=bbd41b7e-db68-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=cc21ffcb-c56c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=561582) **It’s an impressive list, team — but this is no time to rest up.** Millions of hardworking American families still struggle to make ends meet as we begin a new year. name: Conservative Direct
subject: Most Americans polled say 2021 was horrible year
body:
Many Americans report that they are worse off financially than one year ago. -- Americans worried about everything from finances to COVID-19 have ranked 2021 as a horrible year in multiple polls. Half of Americans say 2021 was the "worst year of their lives so far," and 53% described the year as very unpleasant, according to OnePoll's end-of-the-year survey. In a Rasmussen Reports poll released Friday, 48% of respondents described 2021 as poor. Nearly two-thirds of Americans said 2021 was bad or terrible in a YouGov poll, and 58% said it was "one of the worst years in American history." Just 2% of American adults told Rasmussen that 2021 was one of the best years ever, while 5% said 2021 was excellent and 16% said it was a good year. In the YouGov survey, Republicans (75%) were more likely than Democrats (43%) to call 2021 one of the worst years in U.S. history.  According to the YouGov poll, Democrats appear more pessimistic about the past than Republicans, but they are more optimistic about the future. Democrats are more likely than their GOP counterparts to call the last decade one of the worst in American history, at 34% to 25% per YouGov. 18% of Republicans call the past 10 years one of the best decades in American history compared to 6% of Democrats.  Looking to 2022, 28% of Democrats told YouGov they think it will be a good or great year for America, versus 9% of Republicans, most (66%) of whom think 2022 will be bad or terrible. The Rasmussen poll asked respondents if they felt better or worse off economically, and nearly half said worse by a 48% to 20% margin, The Washington Examiner reports. The Rasmussen report added, "If there’s any bright spot in the public’s grim assessment of 2021, at least it was better than 2020, which Americans rated the worst year in more than a decade of surveying." The overwhelmingly negative responses come less than one year into President Joe Biden's presidency. An average of 51.6% of people disapprove of Biden, while 43.3% approve. Excluding President Donald Trump, Biden's approval rating is lower than any of his recorded predecessors dating back to President Harry S. Truman. Last week, COVID case numbers broke records on several days.  Inflation in November hit its highest point in nearly 40 years. The U.S. Department of Labor Consumer Price Index stated, "The all items index rose 6.8 percent for the 12 months ending November, the largest 12-month increase since the period ending June 1982.” Inflation is expected to climb further in 2022 as well. |

clean_body: Many Americans report that they are worse off financially than one year ago. -- Americans worried about everything from finances to COVID-19 have ranked 2021 as a horrible year in multiple polls. Half of Americans say 2021 was the "worst year of their lives so far," and 53% described the year as very unpleasant, according to OnePoll's end-of-the-year survey. In a Rasmussen Reports poll released Friday, 48% of respondents described 2021 as poor. Nearly two-thirds of Americans said 2021 was bad or terrible in a YouGov poll, and 58% said it was "one of the worst years in American history." Just 2% of American adults told Rasmussen that 2021 was one of the best years ever, while 5% said 2021 was excellent and 16% said it was a good year. In the YouGov survey, Republicans (75%) were more likely than Democrats (43%) to call 2021 one of the worst years in U.S. history.  According to the YouGov poll, Democrats appear more pessimistic about the past than Republicans, but they are more optimistic about the future. Democrats are more likely than their GOP counterparts to call the last decade one of the worst in American history, at 34% to 25% per YouGov. 18% of Republicans call the past 10 years one of the best decades in American history compared to 6% of Democrats.  Looking to 2022, 28% of Democrats told YouGov they think it will be a good or great year for America, versus 9% of Republicans, most (66%) of whom think 2022 will be bad or terrible. The Rasmussen poll asked respondents if they felt better or worse off economically, and nearly half said worse by a 48% to 20% margin, The Washington Examiner reports. The Rasmussen report added, "If there’s any bright spot in the public’s grim assessment of 2021, at least it was better than 2020, which Americans rated the worst year in more than a decade of surveying." The overwhelmingly negative responses come less than one year into President Joe Biden's presidency. An average of 51.6% of people disapprove of Biden, while 43.3% approve. Excluding President Donald Trump, Biden's approval rating is lower than any of his recorded predecessors dating back to President Harry S. Truman. Last week, COVID case numbers broke records on several days.  Inflation in November hit its highest point in nearly 40 years. The U.S. Department of Labor Consumer Price Index stated, "The all items index rose 6.8 percent for the 12 months ending November, the largest 12-month increase since the period ending June 1982.” Inflation is expected to climb further in 2022 as well. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dig Deeper... Here’s why I’m running:
Our democracy is still under assault, and each day brings new and creative attacks from Donald Trump, the Republicans in Congress in his thrall, and Republicans in State Houses across the country. They are assaulting voting rights, and spreading the Big Lie, all to great effect. And they show no signs of stopping.
The right to vote is fundamental. The right on which all others rest. And if we don’t protect it, and build back our democracy after the last four years, we may not recognize what it looks like in four more. That’s what drives me, and that’s what I’ll keep fighting for. _Our Democracy._
I’m also running to make real progress on the big policy issues – the ones that make an impact on people's daily lives – that my constituents sent me to Washington to tackle. Ending the pandemic. Making the economy work for everyone. Making health care universal. Fighting climate change. Lowering living costs and helping bottom lines. And local issues like ensuring everyone has a roof over their head, preserving open space for generations to come, and investing in new, greener infrastructure and mass transit.
We’ve seen amazing progress in 2021. We passed a major relief package that cut child poverty in half. We passed a bipartisan infrastructure package that will bring a substantial investment in our roads, bridges, transit, and airports, as well as cleaner water and air. And the House passed a critical measure to lower prescription drug costs, provide family leave, help lower childcare costs, and fight climate change.
_That job isn’t finished. Not by a long shot. That’s why I’m running for re-election._
California has a jungle primary. I’m going to face a lot of challengers – both Democrats and Republicans – who will raise a lot of money, run competitive races and try to beat me. That’s why I am asking respectfully for your help, today.
**[Can you chip in $5, $10, or even $20 today to help my campaign have a really big day for our re-election announcement? The more we raise now, the more we can invest in television and online ads, GOTV efforts, and yes, even those old-fashioned mailers to reach voters:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40330681/323849494/1138271422?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20220103_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzIwZmNkMC1jNDZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9qeAp4v5F6I8zFwOOvS61r-0xOyp4VgGRo87He2RnBo=)**

subject: NPR: Twitter bans Marjorie Taylor Greene’s personal account over COVID misinformation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_TF_NPRban [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_TF_NPRban][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88906/images/npr%20logo.png]
Twitter bans Marjorie Taylor Greene's personal account over COVID misinformation
Twitter has permanently suspended the personal account of Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene for "repeated violations of our COVID-19 misinformation policy."
On Saturday, the Georgia Congresswoman tweeted a thread criticizing the efforts of heroic health officials who are trying their best to prevent deaths and the further spread of the COVID-19 pandemic.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s response? She claimed Twitter was an “enemy to America and can’t handle the truth.”
"That's fine, I'll show America we don't need them and it's time to defeat our enemies."
—Marjorie Taylor Greene, January 2
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s presence in Congress is an embarrassment to the institution and to the American people. That’s why Marcus Flowers -- a Veteran and a Democrat -- is running to replace her in 2022.
Defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene isn’t going to be easy -- but nothing worth doing ever is. So we need your help: Can you donate $25 or more to help Marcus Flowers restore honor and integrity to Congress this November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_TF_NPRban]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_TF_NPRban]
It wasn't our goal to remove her from Twitter -- but it sure as hell is our goal to remove her from Congress.
Thanks for helping us do just that,
Team Flowers for Congress

clean_body: [] Twitter bans Marjorie Taylor Greene's personal account over COVID misinformation Twitter has permanently suspended the personal account of Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene for "repeated violations of our COVID-19 misinformation policy." On Saturday, the Georgia Congresswoman tweeted a thread criticizing the efforts of heroic health officials who are trying their best to prevent deaths and the further spread of the COVID-19 pandemic. Marjorie Taylor Greene’s response? She claimed Twitter was an “enemy to America and can’t handle the truth.” "That's fine, I'll show America we don't need them and it's time to defeat our enemies." —Marjorie Taylor Greene, January 2 Marjorie Taylor Greene’s presence in Congress is an embarrassment to the institution and to the American people. That’s why Marcus Flowers -- a Veteran and a Democrat -- is running to replace her in 2022. Defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene isn’t going to be easy -- but nothing worth doing ever is. So we need your help: Can you donate $25 or more to help Marcus Flowers restore honor and integrity to Congress this November? A quick email to say thank you, to all of you | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8syXWs3hMqHjrRPLw2dDW30WenVyDRqF3B0tjqwIkUIylmSIg8etm_nTWA0MvOGjuGjTCtOAi1qANMSzkWtsouKHHszBeFf8UbSPKu0L249LeqrD-OwkEReGiRRha4iWHxQ694uKk3ipx0IZt2WJmsALh-s5GQtCSrILYneEqmBza_FyDLXmdZGVWZZkE0vUW5f0b-ml6k8Rpc1m7tVczZJ0/3ie/ZBLu9rffTwqMpLaQI8c8IQ/h0/EPxbQJNv_hSK68P9CY7ihto6Xp3UuwpR5-75u1nmGuA) Dear team, This is just a quick email to say thank you, to all of you, for the support you gave me and my campaign in 2021. I am so proud of our community. Thank you for joining me in believing that it is possible to give power back to the people in IL-07.
Thanks to you, we were able to exceed our fundraising total from last quarter and finish 2021 strong. **Now that 2022 is here, we are ready to unleash the full force of our organizing work around the district.** From petition signature collection, to socially distanced door knocking and phone banking, January is going to be an exciting and transformative month for our campaign.
I am so grateful to have all of you with us. When we work together, everything is possible.
In solidarity, Kina Collins [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvCmYnnW-6I0oaLoxnMYHNBsLaISLUNUYmMsQ3QbPfCtfzOV2z_vuzwmO9DF6uUiscK_l58TFHZASsw7PfH2ZHfuWSwWafDyLXXtfe2iZue186DzaC7E64a66Q7_qFrYHiwL07VJC1Eev8ij3FxUcFVRf2duveIupuvsnvmnSpWec0gcSYUf5hUzqPK25AxBWlELN8SZuiaer9cF8MtD4OLB5LEWbkaRIIP_DCzd1utKcMkOP_4scQFtkc78s9qXm6dx3tXjgDibE1mexFCH_mlg/3ie/ZBLu9rffTwqMpLaQI8c8IQ/h1/7i684QAK7BAEFPILOZxMIrVfFjO2j527gpFqJWxP5is) | To give by check:

clean_body: A quick email to say thank you, to all of you | | | Dear team, This is just a quick email to say thank you, to all of you, for the support you gave me and my campaign in 2021. I am so proud of our community. Thank you for joining me in believing that it is possible to give power back to the people in IL-07. Thanks to you, we were able to exceed our fundraising total from last quarter and finish 2021 strong. Now that 2022 is here, we are ready to unleash the full force of our organizing work around the district. From petition signature collection, to socially distanced door knocking and phone banking, January is going to be an exciting and transformative month for our campaign. I am so grateful to have all of you with us. When we work together, everything is possible. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Team King
subject: John King + special guest + and you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Happy New Year, Team! We wanted to make sure you saw this message last week from Melissa about John’s virtual 47th birthday celebration tomorrow on Zoom. We’ll be joined by a very special guest who you won’t want to miss! Can you join us? [https://www.mobilize.us/teamjohnkingforgovernor/event/433454/]

RSVP YES [https://www.mobilize.us/teamjohnkingforgovernor/event/433454/]
RSVP NO [secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q1_em?refcode=email-ngp-20220103-b1_evt&amount=25]

Tickets to attend this special event start at just $4.70, and they’re going fast! Don’t miss your chance to reserve your spot and get your ticket now!

We can’t wait to celebrate with you,
Team King

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Melissa King < info@johnkingforgovernor.com >
Date: Wed, Dec 22, 2021 at 2:55 PM
Subject: Will you celebrate John’s birthday with us?
To: < dpwillis67@gmail.com >

Hi there Peter,

Today marks the official start of Capricorn season, which means John’s birthday is right around the corner. On January 5th, John will be turning 47 (hard to believe, I know!), and to celebrate his special day the team and I are throwing him a virtual birthday party. As a crucial member of this campaign, I wanted to personally reach out and invite you to join us→ https://www.mobilize.us/teamjohnkingforgovernor/event/433454/

RSVP [https://www.mobilize.us/teamjohnkingforgovernor/event/433454/]

Capricorns are often defined by their reliability, determination, faithfulness, and consistency – and no one fits this description better than John. Every year the girls and I look forward to celebrating his birthday together, and I am excited to celebrate with you all in the coming new year! So before you sign off for the holidays, I hope you’ll RSVP to join us for this special virtual celebration for John’s 47th birthday.

RSVP [https://www.mobilize.us/teamjohnkingforgovernor/event/433454/]

I hope you have a joyous and peaceful holiday and enjoy some time resting and unwinding safely.

Thank you for your time and I hope to see you on the 4th,

Melissa Steel King

If you have contributed to the John King campaign in 2021 via check, using another email address, or any other method — thank you! Your contribution has been recorded, and you are an active member of Team King for Governor.

Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
John King for Governor
PO Box 8429
Silver Spring, MD 20107
United States
Follow on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JohnKingforGovernor
Follow on Twitter: https://twitter.com/JohnBKing
Follow on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/JohnKingForGovernor
CONTRIBUTE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q1_em?refcode=email-ngp-20220103-b1_evt&amount=25
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q1_em?refcode=email-ngp-20220103-b1_evt&amount=25&recurring=true
If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our website [https://johnkingforgovernor.com/] .
By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring text messages from John King for Governor. Message & Data Rates May Apply. Text HELP for Info. Text STOP to opt out. No purchase necessary.
If you would prefer to not get updates from the campaign, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4f1826ca-b76c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e/db563d5c-cc6c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjU2M2Q1Yy1jYzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnXp9-jqV-hkQEirbo4eBMrEr-AVDSiy9tLMSknNRoU=&id=128050175

name: Tony Vargas (iPhone)
subject: friend -- a few quick notes on 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
A few reflections as we begin the new year.

|
---

| |
---
Hey, friend -- as we begin the new year, I wanted to take a moment and look back. (And this note will probably be a little longer than most, but it's been a big year!) First -- thank you for being with us on this journey. While our campaign has gained local and national headlines ([setting records for fundraising](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40331836/323855443/-110154025?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYzMzQ4Ni1jYzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGFO7clJUxPk4sVWkWDNV5Jc2s-qI1sH1qtOjqclJsk=&emci=ad72ffd7-416a-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=5bf33486-cc6c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=19927889), [telling our story](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40331837/323855444/-2130435548?si=Soi7iVvFQEO3Jc8JM_74Rg&nd=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYzMzQ4Ni1jYzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGFO7clJUxPk4sVWkWDNV5Jc2s-qI1sH1qtOjqclJsk=&emci=ad72ffd7-416a-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=5bf33486-cc6c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=19927889), [sharing my leadership lessons as a former teacher](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40331838/323855445/-2130435548?si=Soi7iVvFQEO3Jc8JM_74Rg&nd=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYzMzQ4Ni1jYzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGFO7clJUxPk4sVWkWDNV5Jc2s-qI1sH1qtOjqclJsk=&emci=ad72ffd7-416a-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=5bf33486-cc6c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=19927889), [gaining national recognition for our list of supporters](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40331839/323855446/1818113517?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmYzMzQ4Ni1jYzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGFO7clJUxPk4sVWkWDNV5Jc2s-qI1sH1qtOjqclJsk=&emci=ad72ffd7-416a-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=5bf33486-cc6c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&ceid=19927889)), it's support and friendship like yours that's meant the most to us. A few days ago, on New Years eve, we celebrated our son Luca's first birthday. As he and Ava have grown this year, every day Lauren and I are reminded of the responsibility to create a stronger Nebraska for them. The year ahead will be one with even more work, and I'm honored that you'll be there with us.

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. body:
**ICYMI: Wesley Joins Fox and Friends to Discuss Biden's Handling of the Covid-19 Pandemic**

**Houston, TX** - On Monday, Wesley Hunt, Army combat veteran and Houston native, running to represent Texas' 38th Congressional District, joined Fox and Friends to discuss Biden's botched handling of the Covid-19 pandemic. Wesley also detailed the difference between candidate Joe Biden and President Joe Biden, and the blatant hypocrisy of Biden and his administration. | Peter,
BIG ANNOUNCEMENT!
Team Gibbons has launched a 2022 campaign bus tour!
This Tuesday, January 4th, U.S. Senate candidate Mike Gibbons will kick off his statewide tour in Parma for a meet & greet event. Mike will first stop at the Das Schnitzel restaurant and will then make several different stops throughout the state.
The bus tour will travel across Ohio for the remainder of the primary campaign. We have made our way through 65 of the 88 counties and are excited to continue meeting more supporters across the state.
