name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: Thanks for helping us go big in 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40332375/323860789/768602810?refcode=fl_email_na_20220103thankyou_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzZmMWFjNi1kMDZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nQ1tOZ5ew6iBHHq4tS1kTGM9EmhpKXawniLG6hlQwQ=)
---
Friend, Happy New Year, and THANK YOU! To everyone who answered my phone call in the days leading up to our Dec 31 deadline with “You’re calling about the end of the quarter?” shortly followed up with, “I’ve got you;” To everyone who shared our fundraising link on Twitter and Facebook; To everyone who spoke to me for the very first time over the phone, and at the end of the conversation, said “yes” to investing in this campaign; To everyone who donated online, mailed checks, and told their friends about our movement; You are all amazing, and I am truly humbled. With your support, we not only reached our end-of-year fundraising goal, we surpassed it! **Please know that just as every vote counts, so does every dollar._Every single one._ Thank you for helping us go big in 2021, so that we can win in 2022.** We have five months to get on the primary ballot and become the Democratic candidate to take on Republican Brian Fitzpatrick, and eleven months to do what it takes to flip this critical House seat from red to blue. With you by my side, I know we can do it. Thanks again, Ashley PS — One of the best ways you can support our campaign this year is by making a recurring donation to fuel us through Election Day. **[Will you sign up to make a monthly contribution of $5 or $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40332376/323860790/768602810?refcode=fl_email_na_20220103thankyou_ae_full_xx_l1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzZmMWFjNi1kMDZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nQ1tOZ5ew6iBHHq4tS1kTGM9EmhpKXawniLG6hlQwQ=)** | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Add your name to tell my colleagues you want climate action in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
To see our planet as this majestic blue ball floating in the blackness of space is breathtaking.
#

Friends —
Looking at Earth from space is remarkable and hard to describe. To see our planet as this majestic blue ball floating in the blackness of space is breathtaking. It’s truly the most amazing thing I’ve seen.
But when you look more closely at Earth, you start to notice some of our planet’s scars. As a former astronaut, I’m often asked about the climate and damage to our planet. My response often surprises people: _“Don’t worry about the planet. Earth will be just fine. What you need to worry about is the rest of us.”_
But right now, Washington is letting us down. Failure to act on climate comes with a price we will all have to pay in the years and generations ahead.
Most climate scientists believe time is running out if we are to prevent irreparable damage to our planet.
That means there is no time to lose.
2022 must be the year we act on climate. I’m committed to making that happen. Please let my colleagues know you agree:
[**Sign my petition: Tell my colleagues you believe 2022 must be the year we take action to save our planet and finally act on climate change.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/climate_change_petition_220103?source=em220103-1-7&t=1&akid=1893%2E6688874%2ELQznQN)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/climate_change_petition_220103?source=em220103-1-7&t=2&akid=1893%2E6688874%2ELQznQN)**
Make no mistake, our planet is sending us a message. We can’t ignore it, and I can guarantee you it isn’t going to fix itself.
All my best,
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1893%2E6688874%2ELQznQN).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Do you support secure elections?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
America is only as free as its elections are fair. Do you agree?
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?37ifc--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|
| | | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-37ifc-1rn2h-4qqlpo4/)
---
From The Desk Of
MIKE POMPEO
70th Secretary of State
I’m coming to you for help with a critically important issue: _election integrity._

As a veteran, I’ve dedicated my life to protecting our democracy and our American values, and that includes ensuring the integrity of our elections.

Whether it is pushing H.R. 1 - their election power grab bill - or trying to draw new legislative maps that favor their side, the Democrats have shown that they will stop at nothing to hold onto power. Their policies have been a total disaster, so now they are trying to change our election laws to tilt the playing field in their favor. We cannot let this happen.

For Democrats, “fair” is an electoral map that elects as many Democrats as possible. Their strategy has nothing to do with maximizing competitiveness or fighting gerrymandering. It is all about getting Democrats as many seats as possible.

That’s why I am on the frontlines fighting back against the Democrats and their efforts to destroy election integrity. We are working tirelessly to ensure that we elect scores of conservatives who will fight for election security. Whether that means supporting election ID laws or using the courts to stop the Democrat attempts to draw Congressional maps that benefit the radical Left, **[we MUST act now to ensure election integrity](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-37ifc-1rn2i-4qqlpo5/ "we MUST act now to ensure election integrity").**

President Obama’s Attorney General Eric Holder is leading the charge on the Left to try and rig the playing field in the Democrats favor. While he claims to be for “fair” elections, his group’s own tax forms say they exist to "favorably position Democrats" for redistricting. Conservatives can’t sit back and watch this happen. We must take a stand for election integrity.

Do you support election integrity? If so, I need you to join thousands of other Americans in **[signing our Official Election Integrity petition to stop the Democrats' power grab!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-37ifc-1rn2j-4qqlpo6/ "signing our Official Election Integrity petition to stop the Democrats' power grab!")**
---
| | [I Support Election Integrity](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-37ifc-1rn2k-4qqlpo7/)
---

America is only as free as its elections are fair, and I’m going to fight hard to make sure that the crucial battles in 2022 are fought on fair ground. But I need to know where you stand, so **[please SIGN the petition today!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-37ifc-1rn2l-4qqlpo8/ "please SIGN the petition today!")**

Never Give An Inch,

---

Mike Pompeo

Do you agree? & nbsp; &nb; sp; Not interested? | | | | | | From The Desk Of MIKE POMPEO 70th Secretary of State I’m coming to you for help with a critically important issue: election integrity. As a veteran, I’ve dedicated my life to protecting our democracy and our American values, and that includes ensuring the integrity of our elections. Whether it is pushing H.R. 1 - their election power grab bill - or trying to draw new legislative maps that favor their side, the Democrats have shown that they will stop at nothing to hold onto power. Their policies have been a total disaster, so now they are trying to change our election laws to tilt the playing field in their favor. We cannot let this happen. For Democrats, “fair” is an electoral map that elects as many Democrats as possible. Their strategy has nothing to do with maximizing competitiveness or fighting gerrymandering. It is all about getting Democrats as many seats as possible. That’s why I am on the frontlines fighting back against the Democrats and their efforts to destroy election integrity. We are working tirelessly to ensure that we elect scores of conservatives who will fight for election security. Whether that means supporting election ID laws or using the courts to stop the Democrat attempts to draw Congressional maps that benefit the radical Left, "we MUST act now to ensure election integrity". President Obama’s Attorney General Eric Holder is leading the charge on the Left to try and rig the playing field in the Democrats favor. While he claims to be for “fair” elections, his group’s own tax forms say they exist to "favorably position Democrats" for redistricting. Conservatives can’t sit back and watch this happen. We must take a stand for election integrity. Do you support election integrity? If so, I need you to join thousands of other Americans in "signing our Official Election Integrity petition to stop the Democrats' power grab!" | | America is only as free as its elections are fair, and I’m going to fight hard to make sure that the crucial battles in 2022 are fought on fair ground. name: Derek Marshall
subject: It’s finally Election Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
I can hardly believe it! After a whole year of my inaugural campaign for U.S. Congress, we have finally reached 2022, AKA Election Year. We’ve got a big year ahead of us, make no mistake. **Pretty soon, we’ll start hiring for new staff positions for our political, communications, and field programs.** We’ll dig into the voter file for our district and devise our voter engagement strategy now that we officially have our new maps and our new designation as California’s 23rd district. **And to do it all, we’ll need our most ambitious fundraising program to date. **
Everything we need to do in 2022 to win requires money, and a lot of it. We pay our staff a living wage, we need polished literature for our field game, and extras like polling and advertisements cost an arm and a leg. That’s why your help is crucial. **[If you’re able to donate and be an inaugural donor in 2022, I’d really appreciate it. Your investment means our campaign can start Election Year strong and will set us on a path to victory. Will you contribute today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40332819/323863331/-2106432183?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzkyNDYwMC1kNjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URiV7UEsXv7Xxe6l3t8uOxUYqvBRj6NO_a_-IqHqv2w=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40332820/323863332/-926872107?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzkyNDYwMC1kNjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URiV7UEsXv7Xxe6l3t8uOxUYqvBRj6NO_a_-IqHqv2w=)

I never would have made it this far without loyal supporters like you. **Last month, we ended the month on a high note, reaching our monthly fundraising goal AND surpassing our quarterly goal, meaning we out-raised ourselves compared to our 3rd quarter of the year.** We did exceptionally well during what was supposed to be the slowest season of the year, and we owe it all to you.
**Thanks to the help of all of our donors, our campaign has collectively raised $365,000 to date.** In the next month we expect to surpass $400,000 which will allow us to start making some of the financial investments we need to take our campaign to the next level. But we can’t do it alone.
**[Your donations are the lifeblood of this campaign. Your contributions keep us strong and allow us to prepare a winning strategy for 2022 that we believe will take us all the way to victory. Will you begin a monthly recurring contribution today to build a sustainable financial foundation for our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40332821/323863333/-2106432183?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzkyNDYwMC1kNjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URiV7UEsXv7Xxe6l3t8uOxUYqvBRj6NO_a_-IqHqv2w=)**

Once again, thank you for all your support, from 2021 to now. Onwards and upwards!
In solidarity,

**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

clean_body: Peter, I can hardly believe it! After a whole year of my inaugural campaign for U.S. Congress, we have finally reached 2022, AKA Election Year. We’ve got a big year ahead of us, make no mistake. Pretty soon, we’ll start hiring for new staff positions for our political, communications, and field programs. We’ll dig into the voter file for our district and devise our voter engagement strategy now that we officially have our new maps and our new designation as California’s 23rd district. And to do it all, we’ll need our most ambitious fundraising program to date. Everything we need to do in 2022 to win requires money, and a lot of it. We pay our staff a living wage, we need polished literature for our field game, and extras like polling and advertisements cost an arm and a leg. That’s why your help is crucial. = = I never would have made it this far without loyal supporters like you. Last month, we ended the month on a high note, reaching our monthly fundraising goal AND surpassing our quarterly goal, meaning we out-raised ourselves compared to our 3rd quarter of the year. We did exceptionally well during what was supposed to be the slowest season of the year, and we owe it all to you. Thanks to the help of all of our donors, our campaign has collectively raised $365,000 to date. In the next month we expect to surpass $400,000 which will allow us to start making some of the financial investments we need to take our campaign to the next level. But we can’t do it alone. = Once again, thank you for all your support, from 2021 to now. Onwards and upwards! In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: American Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8383%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4OVgLuLkYgW9PJirkAYRkw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11986%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yq6FcUSz0XmsUwHtPSg8FQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11986%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yq6FcUSz0XmsUwHtPSg8FQ&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11987%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mex%2btS4GUuVXyq%2bhdIBiIQ&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8383%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4OVgLuLkYgW9PJirkAYRkw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8383%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4OVgLuLkYgW9PJirkAYRkw&sysid=1)

name: Ann Coulter
subject: Liberals have lost their minds – butthere’s hope
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv77mu0esrhj3vvbk53ldjvhen11gmsc3v9qss20_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2p36cgp62dbk61r38ttimlh30sb7mmq66djkc9prfdpgsdjm8dhkm9on2s9ie1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9cr1cup34phh6sqj1ptgmlin49fg)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z443kmuhmeatpcit17i4d762ii1q0dp4kgdao35g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztfhka7cv2ablnd9c8l3e6ncdrudvbdfhecor6u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhdcvt7k0iridlm8q6nhh961hrelhrl45ob455h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6580tauf5s5cv5cdbomv6rp3uga9j7c7nhs80bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za0uuh219o456sjo1lmossa59afv5ngdn70kjjt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z17gpon93ug0bsr33lk69dad9rnna9rs9o3ph068_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zchkueprf6a0a4uofeh1c354vla5dta98nvcpoj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg7k1aud7b4g1outv32u3i9jm7me2febi3bv0280_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhgt542cobqsc7g3pqehc6ji8j9rpl2pj05bpnuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq49csoi4gjd6d1fa37c294ag3gqpk3v441enejo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm4or0shh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Signature Gathering starts TODAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/915607ba40a7/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-6621837?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=c33f8d9a11&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear friends,

Signature gathering begins today and I need you to sign a packet for my campaign!

Today volunteers will be gathering signatures at the following locations:

[Liberty Park](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=1f195fe92a&e=10c1db3257) (Salt Lake City): 10 am-2 pm
[BYU Duck Pond](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=38e22f815c&e=10c1db3257) (Provo): 3 pm-6 pm
[Riverton City Park](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=9d1d705c29&e=10c1db3257) (Riverton): 10 am-1 pm
[Sunnyside Park](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=79ff2ecd56&e=10c1db3257) (Salt Lake City): 10 am-2 pm

You can find the full list of signature gathering locations with times and dates for the next three weeks [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=b342a87227&e=10c1db3257). Voters registered as Republicans will be eligible to sign a signature packet for the Becky Edwards campaign. For many years, Utah Republican candidates were selected only through the caucus/convention system. In 2014, the Utah Legislature passed SB54, which provides candidates an additional path to gain a place on the primary ballot. If a candidate gathers enough signatures from voters affiliated with their party, they then enter a primary election between the convention winner and those who gather enough signatures. Our campaign plans to do both routes - engaging with delegates and local party members at caucus and convention as well as gathering enough signatures to get on the ballot.

We need 28,000 signatures to get on the primary election ballot. Every individual who signs a signature packet for Becky must meet the following qualifications:
---
|
---
| Thank you for supporting this campaign by signing a signature packet! Together we can bring more proactive, productive, and inclusive leadership to Washington.

---
|
---
|
---
|

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Thank you, sincerely
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6bX6RkwKMGx3O00WvYPcsd6a7LuYgVdx1TaDy6Ywc0k=/T0WdkCJICcGU90YKE5uv_QmamyRKVrbDjF1CCX2eM6g=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210103-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Thank you sincerely for all your support over the past year. The end of December marked perhaps the most crucial fundraising deadline we've faced throughout this campaign, and thanks to the community this campaign has behind it, **we 're in a strong position as we turn the corner into election year.**

My team and I are so grateful for your support of what this campaign stands for: working to improve life for all Virginians, defending democracy in the face of those who seek to dismantle it, and delivering real results for our community.

I can assure you, we feel your support constantly as we inch closer to Election Day and we're eager to learn what this year will hold and see what challenges we'll overcome.

Thank you for joining us on this journey,

Abigail
---

Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Bridget Barton for Governor
subject: PRESS RELEASE: REPUBLICAN OUTSIDER BRIDGET BARTON LEADS FIELD WITH MOST CASH AHEAD OF THE REPUBLICAN GUBERNATORIAL PRIMARY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridget Barton for OregonPO Box 604, Marylhurst, OR 97036-0604
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/51b6543fe7144d35/d4bf468787a99832c3d6b838967d376c/37693)
---
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: January 3, 2022

Contact: Shelby Blake EMAIL: [sblake@axiomstrategies.com](mailto:sblake@axiomstrategies.com) **Republican Outsider Bridget Barton Leads the Field with the Most Cash Ahead of the Republican Gubernatorial Primary** **Portland, Ore.** – Republican Gubernatorial Candidate Bridget Barton began 2022 with nearly $100,000 more cash on hand than any other candidate in the Republican Primary. The West Linn newcomer raised more money in her first five months in the Governor’s race than any other 2022 Republican hopeful in their first five months in the field. Barton, who began the race over six months later than the two top competitors, has already positioned herself for a win by having the most gas in the tank as the primary race commences in 2022. Barton hit the half-million mark before year-end, raising over $500,000 in cash since beginning her candidacy in mid-July. “I’m not a politician. Our beautiful state cannot afford another four years of radical left rule. People across Oregon want big changes that career politicians simply can’t deliver,” said Barton. “I’m an outsider –focused on solving problems.” For more information please visit: [www.bridgetbartonfororegon.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/51b6543fe7144d35/4b3c0be2b70ee7aac3d6b838967d376c/37693) To view her introduction reel visit: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TsHuiTLgyE0&t=4s](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/51b6543fe7144d35/aa912e201d9c7056c3d6b838967d376c/37693) For further press inquiries email: [sblake@axiomstrategies.com](mailto:sblake@axiomstrategies.com)

clean_body: | | | | | Our New Year’s resolution is simple... Keep Nevada BLUE! URGENT: ** | | | It’s no secret that Nevada is one of the most at-risk states for Democrats this year. We know for a fact that Republicans see flipping Governor Sisolak’s seat as a crucial stepping stone to completing their party’s takeover. If we fall short of this New Year’s resolution, we’ll have a Republican governor take control and advocate far-right policies that restrict reproductive rights, undo Steve’s progress on health care, and so much more. Battleground Nevada is the cornerstone of keeping our Democratic influence strong in 2022 and beyond. It’s going to come down to us to keep Nevada blue. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for helping us fulfill our New Year’s resolution. subject: that big pharma money though...
body:
(YIKES) |
---
| | We always hear the term: "Follow the money..."

So, I did.

Here's what I mean...

My opponent has run unopposed since he's been in the senate. Since then, he's taken money from...

-Pfizer
-Johnson & Johnson
-Idaho Association of Realtors
-Pharmaceutical Research & Manufacturers Association of America
-Regence Group
-Idaho Medical Association
-United Health Group
-Altria (Big Tobacco)

His top donating industries:

-Insurance
-Real Estate
-Pharmaceuticals
-Tobacco

In contrast, I'm taking money from... regular people.

And instead of taking money from special interests, I'm fighting to **STOP** medical tyranny, **STOP** the indoctrination of our youth, and **STOP** the pilfering of our bank accounts through out-of-control taxes.

Because Idaho is worth saving.

But it's gonna be a fight...

To help me get the word out, [click here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=bf02872f3c&e=dea908e0fe "https://www.votelenney.com/").

Stay frosty,

Brian

**P.S.** I'm hosting a LIVE event in Nampa next week! [Click here for the details](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=c1ac1fed65&e=dea908e0fe "CRT Event in Nampa").

body:
We want to kick off the New Year strong. Can you help us? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40333407/323866247/-86756021?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODViZDc2OS1kYTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZp8c25CTs_rtXln1OSGQxQATVZcHssZ3YLyurQ6hvM=) Happy New Year, Peter! I hope you and your loved ones had a happy and restful holiday break. We all know that the last year has been difficult for so many families across Texas and our nation. But we’re hopeful that we can chart a new course in 2022. **For us, that means electing a progressive leader in TX-35 in just SIX weeks!** Beginning Feb. 14, Texans across the 35th district will begin casting their early votes for a new representative in Congress. That means our campaign needs to start the year off by reaching as many voters as possible. To do that, we need your help. We want to start 2022 off strong. [**That’s why we’re asking if you can pitch in $22 today to help us kick off the new year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40333408/323866248/-86756021?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODViZDc2OS1kYTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZp8c25CTs_rtXln1OSGQxQATVZcHssZ3YLyurQ6hvM=) [**Donate $22**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40333409/323866249/-86756021?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODViZDc2OS1kYTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZp8c25CTs_rtXln1OSGQxQATVZcHssZ3YLyurQ6hvM=) 2022 is our year, Peter. With your help, we can win this election and deliver on good jobs with better wages, Medicare for All, and a power grid that can keep the lights on. But to do that, we need to start getting out the vote NOW. We’re going to spend the next six weeks hitting the doors and the phones, talking to voters about their hopes for 2022, and sharing our vision for a better future. [**Can you help us start the new year strong? Pitch in $22 to help us get out the vote over the next SIX weeks.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40333410/323866250/-86756021?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODViZDc2OS1kYTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YZp8c25CTs_rtXln1OSGQxQATVZcHssZ3YLyurQ6hvM=) Thank you for being a part of this team, Peter. Happy New Year!

You helped us smash our 2021 goal, and I can’t wait for what we have in store for 2022.

Thanks again for such a successful 2021, and let’s carry that momentum into the new year!

Gratefully,

Brad

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Derek's 48th birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Happy New Year! We hope you had the chance to spend time safely with your loved ones and relax during the holiday season.

As you may know, New Year's Day also happened to be Derek's 48th birthday! Oftentimes his birthday can get swept up in the New Year's celebrations, so we wanted to make this one extra special by reaching out to his supporters with a quick favor:

We're surprising Derek with a belated birthday present we know he'll appreciate -- an outpouring of grassroots contributions from his top supporters (that includes you!) [**Will you help us wish Derek a belated happy birthday by chipping in $4.80, $48, or whatever fits your budget to support him in the new year?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7bTResxBTPaPVQMqXxBJFwtV0nXyL2D-nkZvo_axi9Q=/Z6brJqpMxd-hK4ZH5BQegThpzv2zdg4A2oBpJI3rZZo=?refcode=em22_220103_bday_fnd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220103_bday_fnd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

Let's show Derek that we have his back in 2022. Can we count on you to help us surprise him with a belated birthday gift?

[**Please consider chipping in today to help wish Derek a belated happy birthday and to show he has your support in the New Year. name: Gary Black
subject: What I expect in 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2571db5227943c13/9e7e7c3c133e07cac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — 2022 is here and I want to share with you a bit about what I’m expecting in the months ahead. **

---
I predict that Joe Biden will continue to be Joe Biden... and Raphael Warnock will continue to be Raphael Warnock. I predict nothing will be done to control inflation, secure the border, or control violent crime. I predict nothing will be done to renew America’s energy independence or leadership around the world. And I predict Biden and Warnock will continue trying to nationalize our elections, cripple voter ID, and weaken election security. **Those are easy predictions because it’s obvious that Biden and Warnock are out of touch failures. Here are my other predictions:** Georgians and Americans will rise up to say the liberal wave comes this far and no further. We will defeat Raphael Warnock, take back the Senate majority, and bring a **_RED WAVE_** __ to Georgia in November! **And then, I’ll lead the fight against Biden’s agenda in the Senate. No on-the-job training required. ** Making that prediction a reality will take many months of endurance and hard work. And it won’t come to fruition without patriots like you standing with me. [**What do you say? Will you commit to defeating Warnock and flipping Georgia****RED****? Let me know here. **](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2571db5227943c13/88e485f8374113abc3d6b838967d376c/37793)

body:
I wanted to wish you a very Happy New Year! 2022 is here, and I am so excited about all the amazing things ahead of us on the campaign trail. This is the year Florida finally gets rid of Marco Rubio! | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40333767/323868599/1389757993?refcode=2201-thank-you-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmU4MzZmMS1kZjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XxXzjei5TWR69Aylzc1hyFN04lJLx0TgCOCZCw4c3uc=) Hey team! I wanted to wish you a very Happy New Year! 2022 is here, and I am so excited about all the amazing things ahead of us on the campaign trail. This is the year Florida finally gets rid of Marco Rubio! At the end of last month, we set a lofty goal, and I am SO EXCITED to say that we totally crushed it! We actually SURPASSED our fundraising goal in the final hours of 2021! None of this would have been possible without your continued support. I am so grateful for your commitment and drive for this movement. I am running for U.S. Senate because we need leadership that is serious about facing the trials of our times and taking action. That is why I depend so much on you, I am running a grassroots campaign, and that means we need people power!! This next year is going to be remarkable, I just know it. Wishing you the happiest of New Years! –Ken Russell PS. clean_body: I wanted to wish you a very Happy New Year! 2022 is here, and I am so excited about all the amazing things ahead of us on the campaign trail. This is the year Florida finally gets rid of Marco Rubio! | | | = Hey team! I wanted to wish you a very Happy New Year! 2022 is here, and I am so excited about all the amazing things ahead of us on the campaign trail. This is the year Florida finally gets rid of Marco Rubio! At the end of last month, we set a lofty goal, and I am SO EXCITED to say that we totally crushed it! We actually SURPASSED our fundraising goal in the final hours of 2021! None of this would have been possible without your continued support. I am so grateful for your commitment and drive for this movement. I am running for U.S. Senate because we need leadership that is serious about facing the trials of our times and taking action. That is why I depend so much on you, I am running a grassroots campaign, and that means we need people power!! This next year is going to be remarkable, I just know it. Wishing you the happiest of New Years! –Ken Russell PS. Follow me on social media and find out what the campaign is up to!! **** **** = Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: $20.22. Can I count on you?

body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/P4raFv~zX_)

We are just hours into the most important election year of our lives.

And at this pivotal moment, I need you to understand the situation we're in:

1 - Republicans need to flip just **FIVE** seats to completely destroy our Majority.
2 - They've amassed a **$67 MILLION** war chest to pull it all off.
3 - And now, our polling lead has completely**EVAPORATED**.

Hear me: We have just about ten months to turn this around and defend our Majority from a gut-wrenching Republican takeover - **so we need to move NOW.**

****[That's why I'm calling for my very best grassroots Democrats to rise to the occasion and help me start 2022 in the BEST position possible. Please, can I count on you to chip in $20.22 - or whatever you can spare - to help propel my House Democrats to victory nationwide?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3DKR0F-)****

Friends, Happy New Year, and **thank you**! Thanks to this grassroots team, we reached our end-of-year fundraising goal before the clock struck midnight on New Year’s Eve. [**But our very first filing deadline — _our biggest test yet_ — is right around the corner on January 12.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40334309/323871276/-1236420313?refcode=fl_email_na_20220103thanks_wm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmU4OTJhZi1lMjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmnZyIvjyvnWpD8JU4-zQoSOH6kq1yJXc4YZtWsQEZw=) Since I launched this campaign for Governor of Maryland last June, I’ve been deeply humbled by the outpouring of support from communities and people like you across our state, whether you endorsed me, turned out to an event, told your friends and family about our movement, or pitched in your hard-earned dollars to fuel our campaign. Now that we’ve entered 2022, we have just six months until the primary election, and eleven months until the general, which is anticipated to be **one of the most important gubernatorial elections in the country.** We’ve got a whole lot of work to do between now and June, but with folks like you by my and Aruna’s side, I know we can give Maryland the leadership we deserve this year. Elevate, Wes **PS — Our first reporting deadline is approaching in just _nine days_. [Will you help us start 2022 off strong by chipping in $5 or $10?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40334310/323871277/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_na_20220103thanks_wm_60da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmU4OTJhZi1lMjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmnZyIvjyvnWpD8JU4-zQoSOH6kq1yJXc4YZtWsQEZw=)**

name: Tim Ryan (via Serve America)
subject: we can’t back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40334299/323871265/-2057546413?refcode=20220103_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzkwZjY3NC1lMjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNSVQRgq1m6MdWcgAbYUUI2sxDqQjbzp5Ka17nzCA9Q=) Friend, Somewhere along the line, our country lost sight of how to make things work for everyone. We ended up with an economy and a political system that only works for the wealthy few—while the working folks who dug the deepest and sent our nation soaring were left behind. **I’m running for Senate because it’s time to hit the reset button in Washington and cut workers in on the deal.[ If you’re with me, will you split a donation between my campaign and Serve America?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40334300/323871266/2038802527?refcode=20220103_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzkwZjY3NC1lMjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNSVQRgq1m6MdWcgAbYUUI2sxDqQjbzp5Ka17nzCA9Q=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40334301/323871267/-2057546413?refcode=20220103_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzkwZjY3NC1lMjZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNSVQRgq1m6MdWcgAbYUUI2sxDqQjbzp5Ka17nzCA9Q=)
Folks, I can’t do this without you. This race will be close—I’m polling within single digits of my GOP extremist opponents—and we know what they’ll do if they get power. They’ll obstruct any stitch of progress and pass tax breaks for their wealthy friends who bankroll their campaigns. Friend,
I want to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for all the ways you support my campaign.
My goal is to help Southern Arizona families and small businesses to not only recover from the global pandemic, but to take that next step to building a sustainable economy with opportunities for all.
So, friend:**thank you. I’m so grateful to count you as a member of my team.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40334420/323871940/41694283?refcode=X_10322_ThankYou&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWI5YjBhZC1lNDZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7tkYLMD5wOsLgAURq0khlb6YRKY01t4R29uE11Q5UV0=)

Appreciatively,
Kirsten

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Top 5 liars in the media
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157934:6ij5IuEN9:m:1:3253819041:ACF9AD161940F898D4113E5B849E4DDB:r)
Peter,

It's no secret the mainstream media is occupied by merchants of lies, Leftwing activists, and corrupt power hungry radicals. The Media Research Center (MRC) is the only conservative non-profit dedicated to exposing the Leftwing media and holding them accountable.

MRC monitors the Fake News media outlets to record their lies, expose them, and spread the truth to the American people. **I decided to rank the TOP 5 Liars in the Leftwing-Media and show you how the Media Research Center is fighting back!**

Here are the TOP 5 Liars in the Leftwing-Media (I will highlight the worst parts for you):
1. **Chris Cuomo and CNN:** As the leader of the Fake News Industry, CNN produces some of the most despicable and unethical liars in the media today. MRC recently helped expose Chris Cuomo for aiding his brother's (fmr. NY Governor Andrew Cuomo) sexual harassment allegations.

CNN and Chris Cuomo used their positions to lie about the story, keep Andrew Cuomo in power, conceal his criminal activity, and keep pushing lies about the COVID pandemic

[**You can help the Media Research Center expose more liars like CNN by making a donation here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157934:6ij5IuEN9:m:1:3253819041:ACF9AD161940F898D4113E5B849E4DDB:r)

2. **Jen Psaki:** Joe Biden's Liar-in-Chief, Jen Psaki, is a state sponsored propagandist whose sole job is to cover up the administration's failures and silence conservatives in the media.

MRC records each of her statements, identifies inconsistencies & lies, and holds her accountable to her own words. Jen Psaki attempted to sweep Biden's TOTAL FAILURE in Afghanistan under the rug... MRC refused to let that happen. _We sounded the alarm and let the American people know the truth_.

[**Help the Media Research Center hold the Biden administration accountable to their failures by donating here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157934:6ij5IuEN9:m:1:3253819041:ACF9AD161940F898D4113E5B849E4DDB:r)

3. **Joy Reid:** MSNBC's Joy Reid the Leftwing Media's attack dog for all of their favorite causes.

She uses her position in the media to compare abortion restrictions to "Shariah Law," cancel and silence people she dislikes by falsely accusing them of racism, and promote Critical Race Theory.

Joy Reid is NOT a journalist. MRC is fighting back by exposing her lies to the American people. [**Support the MRC 's battle against MSNBC by donating here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157934:6ij5IuEN9:m:1:3253819041:ACF9AD161940F898D4113E5B849E4DDB:r)

4. **AP "Fact-checkers":** The Leftwing Media has hired a small army of "Fact Checkers" to present their radically biased opinions as facts on all news stories. This is a dangerous new trick the Fake News industry has created to build a false sense of credibility for their political agendas.

Big Tech companies such as Facebook and Twitter have also hired "Fact Checkers" to review content they simply disagree with in an effort to silence conservatives, Trump supporters, and America-First patriots.

The Media Research Center is exposing these "Fact Checkers" and demanding an end to this rigged system. [**Donate to support our efforts here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157934:6ij5IuEN9:m:1:3253819041:ACF9AD161940F898D4113E5B849E4DDB:r)

5. **Rachel Maddow:** MSNBC doesn't even bother trying to present themselves as an unbiased news organization anymore. Rachel Maddow is the official spokesperson for socialism, the Woke agenda, and the Radical Left.

MRC is holding her accountable for failing to report the truth, and lying to the American people in order to force her sick and twisted ideology down our throats.

Peter, this list could easily be 80 pages long.

The Leftwing Media is one of the greatest threats to our Republic, free speech, our values, the Constitution, and our liberty.

I have dedicated my life's work to combating Fake News and defending free speech. The Media Research Center has successfully shattered trust in the leftist media... but our fight isn't over.

The Media Research Center must now fight "Fact Checkers," Big Tech censorship, rabidly pro-socialist reporters, and outright liars in the mainstream media. I am counting on your help to WIN this battle.

My goal is to raise $50,000 to fund MRC's efforts... We are going to WAR with CNN, MSNBC, and the entire Fake News industry. Please use one of the links below to join our fight:

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157934:6ij5IuEN9:m:1:3253819041:ACF9AD161940F898D4113E5B849E4DDB:r)

Defeating the Fake News empire will not be easy.

But we must fight.

The Leftwing Media is mobilizing to influence our elections, force Critical Race Theory into our classrooms, enact socialism, pass AOC's "Green New Deal", and destroy our country.

The Media Research Center is on the frontlines, exposing lies in the media, taking down corrupt "journalists" like Chris Cuomo, and spreading the truth in the media.

The best part? _We are winning_.

The MRC has a proven formula to expose the truth and hold the media accountable.

But the ugly truth is... We will fail without your help.

Unlike the media, we do not receive millions of dollars of funding from George Soros or Bill Gates. The Media Research Center is funded by patriotic Americans who wish to defend our values, fight for free speech, and protect the future of our Republic for the next generation.

[**Please join the Media Research Center by making a donation of $10, $50, $100, $250, $500 or ANY amount by clicking here. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59157934:6ij5IuEN9:m:1:3253819041:ACF9AD161940F898D4113E5B849E4DDB:r)

Thank you for everything you do for liberty and for our country.

Brent Bozell
President & Founder of MRC

name: need your support (Left Action)
subject: Sign Now: Demand Congress protect our right to vote >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Demand Congress pass legislation to protect and expand our right to vote](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc7b77b8-f512-45c4-aeab-000f3adf6a3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14a9e989-6ea5-4bb2-ad20-7db84720e17d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Our right to vote is under attack. In state legislatures across the country, Republicans have been pushing hundreds of bills that unfairly restrict voting rights for millions of Americans. In 2021, more than 425 bills with provisions that restrict voting rights were introduced in 49 different states. This is absolutely unacceptable. Voting is a fundamental right that should not be used to score political points. [We need to protect our democracy from Republican voter suppression efforts once and for all by passing federal voter protection laws. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5bc302f-13e4-4a1f-88b5-6fdd35b9059f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act will put measures in place to protect the right to vote to ensure everyone can make their voices heard in our elections. We know Republicans will do ANYTHING to crush these bills. So we need to show a flood of support right now. [Sign your name to demand Congress pass legislation to protect our right to vote.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T111b2223-a374-4c12-8bf3-090060dae1e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T897f4a8f-2a54-4d1c-a020-91e0cf4a05f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |

Looking to take action on another front? Check out the [list of some recent LeftAction Actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8fb6284d-8c41-460b-b9ef-76865b2e488f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). If you can, make a donation to help us cover expenses.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Our right to vote is under attack. In state legislatures across the country, Republicans have been pushing hundreds of bills that unfairly restrict voting rights for millions of Americans. In 2021, more than 425 bills with provisions that restrict voting rights were introduced in 49 different states. This is absolutely unacceptable. Voting is a fundamental right that should not be used to score political points. The Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act will put measures in place to protect the right to vote to ensure everyone can make their voices heard in our elections. We know Republicans will do ANYTHING to crush these bills. So we need to show a flood of support right now. | | | | | | | Looking to reach progressive activists?. Looking to take action on another front? Check out the . If you can, make a donation to help us cover expenses. | | | | | | | | Thanks, Left Action | | | Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I
| | | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze16hv9a1lde79a21u1b4i67td7uus8bsmhjghd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm9o34cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zo9g8clc2s3kju61dfceov3ln7bjh72in2jpt3so_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm9o34cjh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7u67ae5vbl0j270vq4247eohicqrnfoaq7dnfqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9gm9o34cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, Happy New Year! **I wanted to take a moment to thank everyone who supported our campaign in 2021****. It was a busy year, and it’s worth taking a minute to reflect on what we were able to do together:** We launched our grassroots campaign to beat 42-year corporate incumbent Steny Hoyer and finally win some damn change. Watch our launch video [**here**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8EjySwCm4lB87bEFUowZNCC9spYNjgzrIDTGFXzJvsxb8AET4jk8eXxQY0Oy-lKJ5kIwlVLpNJnW4zeSMcjN_zPNaCm8leXRZbPfggyZVN3MyPyCljgWvXLSkUiHfrNEvDnSUzUF-0zrDUj9BRpM1y60uscaPZP2oJuPkDmH_FVym5DKeu6yLEYizXc4_qH2250jmreiFYCAmbEwLZ-daYINcQ0-oyo8Bws91dGnJT-9w/3ie/WpffO2xCSleWVVBirNsGYA/h0/ijk5ECKcb8UQSFGAI3zfnL9DAZ8DZ8LK2i4gTBC7eFg). [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8EjySwCm4lB87bEFUowZNCCm7m8VRVoelSNFeTF1YKgDAzuUWBA6AvMdb2C_FU5cqVdfGvb_iBJSd4e_pRNkFtpHWWgcsyrq1PdBmcfRC5ZxJEGx74tMrKZjHFAB7pRY3UKbF8xPZzsGgRxEOsLAQSkFydumrog6_k7V6-UgObylpCf4kpCfwSBHbw3Hn9TAhwxRzmTSN6YjuxD2QwnPR0CmfBRIKO6P13uPSlb_TtR6Q/3ie/WpffO2xCSleWVVBirNsGYA/h1/3nwHvQ-Zg0aSA1hXIhJtqjI0LCLC8Ra-aO-7g2_fwus) Our campaign was endorsed by a number of local elected officials and community leaders, including Mayor of Greenbelt Colin Byrd, school board members Raaheela Ahmed and Shayla Adams-Stafford, and vice mayor Scott Cecil. Our campaign was also endorsed by national organizations including Democracy for America and RootsAction. More endorsements – local and national – are coming in 2022. We held a series of meet-and-greets hosted by Black-owned and community-owned small businesses. We led a Day of Action with the Free Kenny Collins campaign. Kenny has been incarcerated – for a crime he did not commit – in Maryland State Prison for over 30 years. We are hopeful that 2022 will be the year he will finally be able to come home. We launched tenant canvassing to share information about how to apply for rental aid. We remembered and celebrated Tom Johnson. We helped get out the vote in local elections in November, which included Greenbelt becoming the first city in the entire country to successfully pass a ballot question on reparations! Yard signs started going up across the district. We led a holiday food drive in November and toy drive in December to help those in need. Thank you to everyone who pitched in to help make these happen. For so many of us, though, 2021 was difficult. I lost my aunt and uncle to COVID just this month. I know I'm not alone. So many people just barely held on this year. Here's to a much better 2022 – one full of hope. One full of change. Stay safe in the snow today, Mckayla | [ DONATE
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlNPoPV6Ev2b4ZJPMAtQ9krCd9Ktl_HoUCLrEtyQbGQe74KjRYQC-3WgCMQNZiM7Zfbi6LtGKtvB4tR2q8mydfadmXShA-IktblnBS7vR3cB53rRMDC6OjyGhY8uDOycxgXIRORLEX1SYc_JcxtnBAFre5cvjAqlV_YmYnVAGuzMNDtIos8L9K_DgQ4GHI_8CPUqURhZztdHUSREBpdL_hyFYI1mDLdWYqqYQqV9yK4nFUc0tZKklNu94mG18SQ_911EcOg-hJy9KmWMIfoawGAgHmw1fvgFHKXW1QL0DjzQ/3ie/WpffO2xCSleWVVBirNsGYA/h2/k7Sfsahp6yPvRGrmdYtb-npjVNL1gs7xasoyULnIDbQ)

| I’m writing today to say thank you, Peter.

With the support of grassroots donors like you, we were able to surpass our quarterly fundraising goal and will be able to report robust fundraising numbers to the FEC for the final quarter of 2021.

This campaign is powered by folks like you, who are tired of seeing politicians put personal profit over their constituents’ needs. I will never forget where I came from or who I work for, and I will never stop fighting for the issues that matter most to Nebraskans.

In 2022, I look forward to flipping my home district blue and becoming Nebraska’s first Black Congresswoman. It means the world to me and my team that you are willing to step up and support our campaign when it matters most. With you by our side, anything is possible!

With gratitude, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40334532/323872690/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220103-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTg4YjllNy1lNzZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCYuK01EFkXNz0Ww4CVPnuOociFASWuQsr2-T044B7c=)

body:

name: Theresa Coates Ellis for Congress
subject: [New post] Important weather, traffic and emergency contacts for VA 10th
body:
theresacoatesellis posted: " Friends, The best place to be today is inside and safe. Here are some important contacts for you if you must travel or have power outages and emergencies. Medical, Safety, or Emergency: 911Dominion Energy: Report Outage or Emergency phone num" | | |
---
## New post on **Theresa Coates Ellis for Congress**
|
---|---
| | [](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1) |
## [Important weather, traffic and emergency contacts for VA 10th](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2022/01/03/important-weather-traffic-and-emergency-contacts-for-va-10th/)
by [theresacoatesellis](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1)
---|---
Friends,
The best place to be today is inside and safe. Here are some important contacts for you if you must travel or have power outages and emergencies.
Medical, Safety, or Emergency: 911
**Dominion Energy:** Report Outage or Emergency phone number [(866)366-4357](tel:\(866\)366-4357), map, or report online and website:
[https://www.dominionenergy.com/virginia/report-outage-or-emergency](https://www.dominionenergy.com/virginia/report-outage-or-emergency?utm_source=10th+Congressional+GOP&utm_campaign=156326ca64-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_01_03_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_037b00dc72-156326ca64-)
**VDOT Traffic Information**. Call [511](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2022/01/03/important-weather-traffic-and-emergency-contacts-for-va-10th/tel:511). Check out the "Overlays: Precipitation" and other settings.
[https://www.511virginia.org/](https://www.511virginia.org/?utm_source=10th+Congressional+GOP&utm_campaign=156326ca64-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_01_03_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_037b00dc72-156326ca64-)
**NOVEC Outage Center:** Report an Outage by phone call [888-335-0500](tel:888-335-0500) After registering your cell to your account profile, text #OUT or #STATUS to 85700 or online: [https://www.novec.com/My_Account/report-outage.cfm](https://www.novec.com/My_Account/report-outage.cfm?utm_source=10th+Congressional+GOP&utm_campaign=156326ca64-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_01_03_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_037b00dc72-156326ca64-)
**NOVEC Map of Outages:**
[https://www.novec.com/stormcenter/index.cfm](https://www.novec.com/stormcenter/index.cfm?utm_source=10th+Congressional+GOP&utm_campaign=156326ca64-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_01_03_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_037b00dc72-156326ca64-)
[https://www.novec.com/stormcenter/Outage-Information.cfm](https://www.novec.com/stormcenter/Outage-Information.cfm?utm_source=10th+Congressional+GOP&utm_campaign=156326ca64-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_01_03_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_037b00dc72-156326ca64-)
**Rappahannock Electric Cooperative** : Report or check on outages: call [800.552.3904](tel:800.552.3904) or go online or check map: [https://outagemap.myrec.coop/](https://outagemap.myrec.coop/?utm_source=10th+Congressional+GOP&utm_campaign=156326ca64-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_01_03_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_037b00dc72-156326ca64-)
Manassas City Snow Route Finder and to report snow issues:
Snowline [(703) 257-8353](tel:\(703\)%20257-8353) to report your snow related issues/concerns.

Also check your local government, emergency, public safety, public works, websites, social media news for the closing, conditions, outages, traffic, and emergencies for your area. Sign up for any email or text alerts offered in your community.

body:

name: Drew Thompson
subject: The Fight for our Country is in our Classrooms
body:
[](https://) Peter, In 2021, parents around our country woke up to the fact that our kids are not learning what we thought they were. From school boards to classrooms, we are now engaged in an enormous struggle for the future of this nation. Join Jane Timken, elected officials, and other concerned parents on January 13th for a pathway to victory, and learn how we win on education in 2022. Click the button below to sign up! **Parents for Jane** Date: Thursday, 1/13/2021
Time: 5:45 p.m.
Location: Dublin Community Recreation Center. Dublin Community Hall

Happy New Year, Peter!

As we close the books on 2021, I want to thank you for all the support you’ve shown my campaign for Senate. We’ve proven that we can build a movement that will beat Ron Johnson in November.

Now you know, it’s 2022, which means we’re just 11 months away from Election Day -- **the day we have the chance to remove Ron Johnson from office for good.**

But I’m not going to sugar coat it, it’s going to be a tough fight. Cook Political Report ranks this race as a tossup, which means both Ron Johnson and us have a chance to win this thing.

Wisconsin is no stranger to tight elections, we’ve seen with Joe Biden and Tony Evers that elections can come down to the wire. That’s why we’ve been organizing over the last year and are going to go all out in 2022 to win.

Thank you again for your support as we kick off Election Year, and I can’t wait to see what we’re able to accomplish in the next 11 months.

-Alex Lasry
---
**** | **** | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. name: Team Holly
subject: BREAKING: Permanently suspended
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, when Marjorie Taylor Greene got elected in 2020, the circumstances were bleak.
Marge was ramping up her hateful rhetoric and the only democrat in the race was forced to drop out weeks before the election. This left Marjorie Taylor Greene with a wide open lane to the Halls of Congress. However, the democratic challenger still got 25% of the vote despite no longer running.
Let’s be honest folks, GA-14 democrats were scared and had nowhere to turn in 2020. That won’t be the case in 2022. If a candidate who dropped out got 25% of the vote, imagine what our campaign is capable of.
GA-14 cannot have a repeat of 2020. The same folks who voted for Marge were since abandoned and left in the dust. The atmosphere has shifted and we’re going into 2022 ready to fight.
Team Holly knows this won’t be easy by any means. That’s why we have launched the biggest voter registration program GA-14 has ever seen. The ground work we’ve been doing to flip moderates, outreach voters, and register democrats is how we’re going to win this race. Chip in $14 today, and together we can provide Northwest Georgia with true leadership. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1216]
Thanks so much,
Team Holly.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1216] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]

name: Team DeSantis
subject: In 2022, Freedom is on the Ballot
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6624%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Wfes8oV1udUxiMiSRbpJwA&sysid=1)
[****](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68343%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ng3ntz1qW9715Rbi0jXFww&sysid=1)
Friend,
We’re getting ready for an election in 2022 that will set the course for generations of Floridians.
Will Florida continue serving as an oasis of freedom, blazing the path for other states to follow? Or will Florida turn into a dystopian wasteland like we’ve seen happen under Democratic leadership across the country?
**[CHIP IN $20.22 TO HELP RE-ELECT GOVERNOR DESANTIS IN 2022 >>> ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68344%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YUBVV6NSS7f5GT0zxIKY9w&sysid=1)**
Governor DeSantis has spent the past 3 years creating a state that embraces freedom and acts as a bastion of opportunity for all Floridians. He’s stood toe to toe with tyrants who want nothing more than to strip you of your liberty._** But our governor has REFUSED to back down.**_
Florida has a governor who doesn’t believe “15 days to slow the spread” should turn into “3 jabs or lose your job.” He doesn’t believe our children should be required to wear a mask in school all day or be force-fed Democratic indoctrination that teaches some children they are oppressors and others they are oppressed simply because of the color of their skin.
Instead of locking people down, Governor DeSantis spent the past 3 years lifting people up. He’s protected our environment AND our economy. People are beating down the door to live in Florida and open businesses in our state thanks to Governor DeSantis.
**[CHIP IN $20.22 TO REELECT GOVERNOR DESANTIS IN 2022 >>> ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68455%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rtP0bQ1hgxwOMuu7BtE8NQ&sysid=1)**
But, with the 2022 election, Democrats want to change all of that. Florida will descend into a downhill spiral if Democrats take control. Individual liberty and common sense will be relics of the past.
**We can’t allow that to happen to our great state.**
[**Friend, can we count on you to help us continue the fight for a free Florida? We can’t do this fight without your support. Chip in $20.22 to reelect Governor DeSantis in 2022! **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68456%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Syr6D%2f8goU3znLCAff4nMw&sysid=1)
Sincerely,
Team DeSantis

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68343%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ng3ntz1qW9715Rbi0jXFww&sysid=1 "CHIP IN") [CHIP IN](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68457%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tWzRLEFp9xn423uK5M2pcg&sysid=1)

name: Congresswoman Joyce Beatty
subject: We need Tim Ryan in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1869%2E3611125%2ElRAQtr ][IMG]

Folks,

I’ve had the pleasure of working alongside Tim and seeing firsthand how he
shows up every day to fight for working people—and he’s exactly who we
need representing Ohio in the Senate.

But it will take a lot of hard work and a lot of resources to win his
battleground race and send Tim to the Senate. We’ve got to start laying
the groundwork now so it can pay off on Election Day.

That’s why Tim needs your help right now. He’s up against GOP extremists,
and on top of that, the poll margins are razor thin. We need grassroots
supporters to step up and chip in what they can—every dollar counts!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6370?t=1007&akid=1869%2E3611125%2ElRAQtr ]I’m personally asking: Will you join me in supporting Tim by chipping
in a few bucks to flip this open Senate seat blue?

subject: It's official:

It's official, friend. We've entered the election year, and we've got a great deal of work ahead.
**The truth is, if I defeat Marco Rubio here in Florida, there is _no hope _of Republicans taking back the Senate. And Mitch McConnell and his wealthy allies know it.**

That's why Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to defeat me and retake their Senate majority. We can't let that happen.
Everybody from McConnell to Donald Trump will continue doing _whatever it takes_ to win in Florida and flip the Senate – and that's why, as we officially enter the election year, I'm personally reaching out early to top supporters like you, friend.
Right now, I'd like to invite you to become an official Election Year Member of my campaign. **I've set a goal of having 50,000 grassroots donors join me to flip Florida and defend the Senate majority, but I don't see your name on my list yet:**

**[Please, will you pitch in a donation and activate your Election Year Membership right now? Every dollar you give ensures we'll have the resources to compete against Marco Rubio as we get closer to Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40335281/323876027/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1923-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM0NjE3Mi1lZTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9wxAeIBStXlHElSAQtINh2QdNMU11ufHMPfmsHS4Gng=)**

There's a number I've asked this team to keep in mind before, and I've got to bring it to your attention again: **10,033. **

That's the number of votes that decided Florida's last Senate race – a margin of less than one-eighth of a percentage point. That's about as slim as margins come, so I _need_ you to hear me when I say this: Every dollar we don't raise __ is a missed opportunity to mobilize voters. **In a race this close, with Senate control on the line, missing out on resources is simply not an option. **

As we kick off the election year, YOU have the power to guarantee _ _ that this campaign has the resources to help me enter the year strong enough to compete against Rubio, McConnell, Trump and the entire Republican establishment. **[That's why I'm asking for 50,000 top supporters like you to donate $5 or whatever you can chip in to activate your Election Year Membership. Can I count on your donation right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40335283/323876029/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1923-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTM0NjE3Mi1lZTZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9wxAeIBStXlHElSAQtINh2QdNMU11ufHMPfmsHS4Gng=)**

name: American Defense News
subject: Flawed and outdated?
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3da72unjooes12ql55cdvlva5t64krmq6f01j0o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp64s9jmtgr6c72m8pjco73m5rjcsrge2q32d9impgm0tbgscrbcpbk65im2d1gcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lib6ob0e8pmccdimdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5i64pb6clj64oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvl963keltlv2kbrcf1a38876r9gp1faf4kkadro_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9imcpb6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlp1vf6ennsic5omp85s2v2372s8h84k97kq4sko_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9imcpb6c9h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5mgu12d68ts7a4m7k7fv6dnk9j1m899itvdtci0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9imcpb6c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

**I’m not a politician.** I don’t have mega-donors and corporate special interest PACs that I can count on to sustain this campaign.

But thanks to grassroots donors like you, an educator, pastor, and non-profit leader has a real shot at unseating an entrenched MAGA Republican.
