name: =?utf-8?Q?Ed=20Thelander?=
subject: 2022 - HERE WE ARE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
Thank you!! You really stepped up! The campaign is starting the new year on solid footing, but our goal for the 1st Quarter of 2022 is doubled! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/42f73aa8b166/a-strong-finish-to-8640313?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=8e264552c8&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| |
> Navy SEALs have a saying: "The Only Easy Day Was Yesterday." In the final days of 2021 I asked for your support to help my campaign close out our first full fundraising quarter strongly. You stepped up, sending us into 2022 on very solid footing. Thank you! I am humbled by the outpouring of support. But that was the easy day. **This will be a very challenging race, and I will continue to need your help to accomplish the mission.**
>
> The next step is earning a place on the ballot. Maine law requires us to collect enough valid signatures of registered Republican voters on official state petitions to ensure my name appears on the ballot. **I am asking for your help collecting signatures at various Town/County GOP meetings across the First Congressional District over the next several weeks.** Contact us at info@thelanderforcongress.com to help with this important effort.
>
> The Maine GOP offers free training sessions on the proper collection of signatures. **Click on the image below for more information: **
> [](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=3cfdccefe3&e=f8a0a76a2b)
> Naturally, we need to continue raising money to compete. Please forward this email to friends or family who may be able to help.
> **[Are you able to help with a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250 or even $500 dollars today?](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=923cb94e38&e=f8a0a76a2b)**
>
> In case you missed it, here is a link to the podcast of my Christmas Eve appearance on WGAN’s Morning News Program with host Aaron Chadbourne. We had a great discussion and listening will help familiarize you with my candidacy.
> [**CLICK HERE TO LISTEN**](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=28b96029ce&e=f8a0a76a2b)

clean_body: Thank you!! You really stepped up! The campaign is starting the new year on solid footing, but our goal for the 1st Quarter of 2022 is doubled! | | | | | | | Navy SEALs have a saying: "The Only Easy Day Was Yesterday." In the final days of 2021 I asked for your support to help my campaign close out our first full fundraising quarter strongly. You stepped up, sending us into 2022 on very solid footing. Thank you! I am humbled by the outpouring of support. But that was the easy day. This will be a very challenging race, and I will continue to need your help to accomplish the mission. The next step is earning a place on the ballot. Maine law requires us to collect enough valid signatures of registered Republican voters on official state petitions to ensure my name appears on the ballot. I am asking for your help collecting signatures at various Town/County GOP meetings across the First Congressional District over the next several weeks. Contact us at info@thelanderforcongress.com to help with this important effort. The Maine GOP offers free training sessions on the proper collection of signatures. Click on the image below for more information: Naturally, we need to continue raising money to compete. Please forward this email to friends or family who may be able to help. In case you missed it, here is a link to the podcast of my Christmas Eve appearance on WGAN’s Morning News Program with host Aaron Chadbourne. We had a great discussion and listening will help familiarize you with my candidacy. Thank you again for helping us finish last year with a strong showing! We’re confident that with your help we can return the voice of Maine people to the House of Representatives! Thank you, and Happy New Year! \- Ed | "Please Donate Here" | Ed Thelander is a United States Navy veteran. Hi Friends,

I want to send my sincere thanks to everyone who donated towards or supported my campaign this past year, it is because of you that I am off to a strong start to my 2022 re-election campaign. Together we are going to keep NY-11 in Republican hands and we are going to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE!

My first year in Congress was filled with major achievements that would not have been possible without your support. Together, we stopped Biden’s plans to pay illegal immigrants $450K and grant them amnesty. We killed Biden’s Build Back Broke bill saving the taxpayers trillions of dollars and avoiding new taxes. We stopped the Democrats cold in their attempts to pack the Supreme Court. These are all BIG WINS and I am going to continue my fight to save the American Dream from the Squad’s goal of making this a socialist nation.

Thanks to you, we’ve been able to raise a significant amount towards my re-election campaign, and I’m so excited to share with all of you what comes next.. Our work towards getting our country back to greatness on the international stage, reigning in the expansive growth of government and keeping your hard earned dollars where they belong - IN YOUR POCKET.

Thank you and God Bless America,

Nicole

Friend,
We're getting ready for an election in 2022 that will set the course for generations of Floridians.
Will Florida continue serving as an oasis of freedom, blazing the path for other states to follow? Or will Florida turn into a dystopian wasteland like we've seen happen under Democratic leadership across the country?

Florida has a governor who doesn't believe "15 days to slow the spread" should turn into "3 jabs or lose your job." He doesn't believe our children should be required to wear a mask in school all day or be force-fed Democratic indoctrination that teaches some children they are oppressors and others they are oppressed simply because of the color of their skin.
Instead of locking people down, Governor DeSantis spent the past 3 years lifting people up. He's protected our environment AND our economy. People are beating down the door to live in Florida and open businesses in our state thanks to Governor DeSantis.
**[CHIP IN $20.22 TO REELECT GOVERNOR DESANTIS IN 2022>>> ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zivg74gg0e8cjvrcp0j7u9a2iq83rggggf7oei8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9im2ob2cph2bs)**
But, with the 2022 election, Democrats want to change all of that. Florida will descend into a downhill spiral if Democrats take control. Individual liberty and common sense will be relics of the past.
**We can 't allow that to happen to our great state.**
[**Friend, can we count on you to help us continue the fight for a free Florida? We can 't do this fight without your support. Chip in $20.22 to reelect Governor DeSantis in 2022! **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcm7se3q4iqreohug1dn1i12tmd3bjeh3obe96ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c9im2ob2cph2bs)

Team DeSantis

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jimmy?=
subject: The first day of school.
body:
| | |
# The first day of school.
---
| | The first Monday after the New Year has always been a big deal. As a kid, it was the first day back from Winter Break, as a high school teacher it is the same. When I worked for the late Congressman Elijah Cummings as an investigator on the House Oversight Committee, I embraced that feeling. It has always been the “First Day of School.” This January 3, that feeling is especially strong for me because one year from today, I could be getting sworn in as your Representative in the United States Congress. I am excited at the prospect of representing Sacramento. I plan to leap into action on that very first day by using my experience as a congressional investigator to immediately get to work on: Ending the homelessness crisis by investigating and eliminating government red tape
* Strengthen our levee system by working with the Army Corps of Engineers to move those living on our levees into supportive housing
* Fighting for affordable and accessible healthcare by supporting Medicare for All and fighting against powerful drug companies

If you believe in our vision for a government that is truly by and for the people, we need your help. The election is in six months. **It is go-time for our campaign.**
---
| | | If you are a first-time donor, please help us get on the ballot by contributing**$22 today to support two volunteer kits for our January signature collection. **
---
|
---
| [Donate $22 Now](https://jimmyfremgen.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5d6ec865a0183dc1741ede23a&id=7d149b5342&e=c4fbacefe0 "Donate $22 Now")
---
| To the more than 200 people that have already supported our campaign,__**THANK YOU.**__ Please match your donation by clicking the link below and help us start this year off strong.
---
| [Make a donation now.](https://jimmyfremgen.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5d6ec865a0183dc1741ede23a&id=b6e6e15690&e=c4fbacefe0 "Make a donation now.")
---
| A modern, compassionate government is one that represents the people it serves, not wealthy corporations. I am committed to putting our community first as your Congressman.
Let's get to work, Jimmy Fremgen
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Jimmy Fremgen for Congress, All rights reserved._

Jimmy Fremgen for Congress1809 S St Ste 101-117Sacramento, CA 95811-6736

body:

BREAKING: Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer just announced that the Senate will vote on filibuster rule changes on or before January 17th. **Will Senator Kyrsten Sinema join with Democrats to end the Jim Crow filibuster and finally advance voting rights legislation — or will she cater to her Republican and corporate donors at the expense of our democracy?** **[YOU can make an impact on Sinema’s decision, Peter. clean_body: Will Kyrsten Sinema change her mind? | | | BREAKING: Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer just announced that the Senate will vote on filibuster rule changes on or before January 17th. Will Senator Kyrsten Sinema join with Democrats to end the Jim Crow filibuster and finally advance voting rights legislation — or will she cater to her Republican and corporate donors at the expense of our democracy? Peter,

In this past year, I’ve attended dozens of events and talked to countless voters in my community. **What I’ve learned, Peter, is that people are fed up with Republicans like Devin Nunes representing them in Congress.**

They want bold action on our climate, they want an economy that works for everyone, and they want to cut through the misinformation MAGA puppets like Devin Nunes peddle throughout our community.

_They want to see our movement win this year._

**My team has been able to position itself to win our Special Election this spring thanks to you.** This last quarter, we met our fundraising goal entirely from thousands of small-dollar grassroots contributions.

But, there is still so much work to do in the quarters left until our Special Election to defeat our far-right opponents and bring the Central Valley the representative it deserves. We really do depend on your steadfast support to fuel our fight against Nunes’ bigoted brand of MAGA Republican politics — _but we cannot lose sight of these amazing movement we’ve built._

**So, thank you, Peter, for your support to our campaign and joining our movement to replace Devin Nunes.**

Let's do this,

From The Bottom of My Heart

| [](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=97b38815f2ab48d5817cfa6ff781a437&_e=pK9EEpdWa8R2BkVK0aVdqvBp4-MsHQil_5WAfXeAkk2w_Bw2lh40PdKNh3mEgFMhhp5V6TnbVmvdMoMlBPQpMwUTsmp1i980stQ4CWdqXqIVkhXuHXfmabFM4sWhv3SxK3o7JRXHoYWLwziyXVjQAwxP7H4pBBF4rQ5Ve1UhuFg4Qargwd9wbhQ6sRCTaoqTm82VrCTwKQKQ27fwKDY0GqWB6Ohd8XsfC0--lLOqkE8bXe5UrHEL9zBRd-qq9saxwhRBdUL5WYNlpPglheAl1gpnSbI29FyQ2s6Kb-UL3RU%3D)
---
Hi there --

I wanted to take a second to personally thank you for joining our campaign over the past year, and helping my team have the funds they need to help us **WIN**.

Here in the Hudson Valley, we have a proud history of community, hard work, and perseverance.

It’s clear that New York needs more leaders in Congress who will fight with the same grit and determination that we demonstrate in our communities every day. I’m running for Congress because we need someone who will make our voices heard and get things done.

It’s time for leadership New Yorkers can rely on. I’m thrilled to have you on my team. Let’s go into 2022 with our foot on the gas!

Thank you,

[ ](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=97b38815f2ab48d5817cfa6ff781a437&_e=pK9EEpdWa8R2BkVK0aVdqvBp4-MsHQil_5WAfXeAkk2w_Bw2lh40PdKNh3mEgFMhhp5V6TnbVmvdMoMlBPQpM4qvLLbLXRKVfJgc8kK-x98u1bOe6OKwjKIgTOSGfdspe8a7xMxzazPWLp13Dqi5y3Gw-MjADD2nAnKue8mLCpXTrSarLSehkcK9-AX3hxA1nhelda4pCu84HMOFvJEW8j6pV6ZXKESpFDnBRuHEwqzqLDzPZWKpuxjF3g3EmFJeR0Ex0wLCCwX5zkdNveUVC4DeEF21GPJQj3xI-lrqp3A%3D)

Colin Schmitt
_Republican Candidate in New York’s 18th Congressional District_
| [**DONATE**](http://links.colinschmitt.com/u/click?_t=2efbf9f7f9b54008ada1569759c619c2&_m=97b38815f2ab48d5817cfa6ff781a437&_e=pK9EEpdWa8R2BkVK0aVdqvBp4-MsHQil_5WAfXeAkk2w_Bw2lh40PdKNh3mEgFMhhp5V6TnbVmvdMoMlBPQpM01-ZHO-fVarz_hNmB6UZgOEJ2QX3jPbIg3Cbw-a89Z4u5ymu7hJdpgUbZTMva4BaKeSE-mNj-eztVIyHMnJ41H_wP6WSMyk6OvGjFWgTvvDSYOzexaPDh-Tduo0Q7D8qfG5_1imCPkJrnAQkRaIngbBK4kIsJKlMh-Y2dWgNUI5dPTxNLzlxKkLEPCeKPQ9JIDGRxZE6g-n2UO0SBM-LG4%3D)

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: FWD: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 725
Bremen, GA 30110
United States

I’m honored that President Trump sees that I’m working to bring that same kind of prosperity right here to Kansas. This endorsement is a big deal. I’m so excited for what the future holds, and most importantly I’m so thankful to have YOUR support on this journey. Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: John Fetterman
subject: More bad news from Dr. Oz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Dr. Oz is putting MILLIONS of his own cash into TV ads.
#
Derek,
According to our latest info, Dr. Oz has now booked $4 MILLION total in TV ads to try to buy this senate seat. With a reported net worth of $100 million, he could spend virtually *unlimited* sums to keep Pennsylvania red. 🔴
**This is a pivotal moment for our campaign, Derek. I *truly* believe that how we respond to this could make or break our momentum.** We’ve got two options:
1. We either stand by while this celeb pseudoscientist buys his way into the U.S. Senate — where he’ll have an even bigger stage to push right-wing policies + COVID conspiracies.

**\- OR -**
2. We raise up a grassroots army so freaking big that we can match him dollar-for-dollar, flip PA blue, and send a true Pennsylvania fighter for working people to the Senate.

**[What do you say, Derek? Can I get you to donate $5 now to help us fight back against this multi-million dollar TV ad onslaught from Dr. Oz? Every bit helps.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39934?refcode=em20220103-4068&t=1&akid=4068%2E434096%2Eg62bam)**
**[Fight Back: Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39934?refcode=em20220103-4068&amount=&t=2&akid=4068%2E434096%2Eg62bam)**
The biggest mistake we could make right now is underestimating Dr. Oz.
Yeah, he’s a celebrity doctor.
Yeah, he’s spent the last decade profiting off of *provably false* obscure medical theories and conspiracies.
Yeah, his home isn’t even in Pennsylvania ... it’s in New Jersey.
**But, you know what? We know another rich celebrity that the politicians and pundits underestimated.** His name is Donald Trump and he won Pennsylvania in 2016. 🙄
With enough money + fame to buy his way to the top, Dr. Oz is a serious threat to win not only the Republican nomination, but the whole damn thing.
**The good news is we have been preparing for this very moment.** We have the biggest grassroots campaign in the state BY FAR. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign Dr. Oz just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why I’m asking YOU right now...
**[Please make a $5 donation to help us fight Dr. Oz’s multi-million dollar TV ad onslaught. Whether you can give $5 or $50 or $500, it doesn’t matter. What’s important is that we all do it together.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39934?refcode=em20220103-4068&t=3&akid=4068%2E434096%2Eg62bam)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39934?refcode=em20220103-4068&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4068%2E434096%2Eg62bam)**
Oz is a big threat. But he’s no match for our movement. 💪💪💪
Let’s win this thing,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220103-4068-footer&t=23&refcode2=4068_434096_g62bam&akid=4068%2E434096%2Eg62bam)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4068%2E434096%2Eg62bam)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4068%2E434096%2Eg62bam)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Charles Booker
subject: Happy New Year, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Happy New Year,
Peter.

I want to start off this year by saying thank you: Because of this
movement’s generosity, love, and commitment we were able to hit our
end-of-year fundraising goal.

My heart is filled with hope knowing that thousands of you chipped in to
help us prepare for 2022. This was no small feat and I am blown away by
the power of this movement.

Especially in these challenging times, we understand that not everyone is
in the position to give. We also know it’s tempting to feel hopeless about
our future. 2021 has been a hard year for so many of us. We witnessed an
insurrection, the pandemic continued to cripple us, storms tore through
our communities, and too many of our families struggled to make ends meet.

But last week, this movement chose hope. A record number of supporters
chipped in to help power our grassroots campaign and fund our fight to
create a new kind of politics that works for all of us. It was an
inspiring ending to the first year of our campaign, and I feel more
energized than ever to fight for the change Kentuckians deserve.

The road ahead is not easy, but I know with everything in me that we can
win this fight. In 2022, Kentucky’s going to elect a Black man from the
hood to the United States Senate.

Whether you chipped in $5 bucks, made a couple phone calls,
or just signed up to be on our email list — please know your support means
the world to me. Together, we’re showing our opponents and the
establishment how strong grassroots donors can be, and how wrong they are
to doubt us.

We are the people who will beat Rand Paul. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14409?refcode=em20220103-1404&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1404%2E346206%2ENF9Kom ]If you’re ready to fight
with me this year to turn the tides of Kentucky and the U.S. Senate, will
you chip in $5 to our people-powered campaign?

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220103-1404-footer&t=1002&refcode2=1404_346206_NF9Kom&akid=1404%2E346206%2ENF9Kom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1404%2E346206%2ENF9Kom

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
Will you support Nikki in 2022?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40336314/323902943/-1987745334?refcode=newyear&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGQ4N2ZkNi1mZDZjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDAzZmZjNTg1N2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-TEaee55CgQvPaorW3L18gVmHX-sq30fE4Aki2SGDk=) Peter, First, I want to wish you all a very happy New Year and thank you for all of the support you gave Nikki in 2021. Second, I want to give you an idea of what this new year is going to look like. In just a few weeks, the Florida GOP will start pushing through more policies restricting our basic rights. [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e454fde173544ca49bf4a08ae92be300&_e=nIuteeK-FbXG2ANnRuN5WQ9edsKdxC6wLrWZnop4JXRTpstEu3S921NBFptHebFqiFFs9UnQ97JMDWu_2x8sFPbRybvs5QcVTr4I3V6Mzqbmkn5OBReER1Ddn0vAXfH6gxcwL7dB9sgmlH21pI9-OrCAvUyGNQq_6qLIvmPJrsk6Hg_y5GYbWitcn-FBkR2ET3SqC6QvqDXi4l1UDeazm4cHDUk77V2mY_SD4dTpfqdvXPVZn-OKtAK-qvGP75a3UAiTx_nvrCexREaWsnlY9w7gurAzkxhbM5pngHs3hdQHfvjKMPsU7DSnrWUvDDz4xQ-LPiXN4jB3qqTMRc9Tv8XEGQ7ZGs_PoRiiT4e2IXnvUhFbOtEYiXGn-ebnXusAW4tzBUq11h-IRKOAAUiQgTzgdlfKTtnBzprkVt6A5D7uE7AhodFRWTQzN3CYV2Aum_vIFBn6aKr0sEnHJlgVtQCNWmc0Ik-nM8_aqE3nx94%3D)

| Peter,

I know things have been all over the place these past two years, especially with Covid and politics. Regardless of all of that, the opportunity to make some changes in D.C. is finally here, _**the Midterm Elections.**_

I know we still have months before the primaries and the general election, but we have to start taking action now if we’re going to make sure those changes we need finally come to Capitol Hill. [**Will you help me fight for those changes by chipping in just $10 or even $20 to help me be the reason we take back Congress?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e454fde173544ca49bf4a08ae92be300&_e=nIuteeK-FbXG2ANnRuN5WQ9edsKdxC6wLrWZnop4JXRTpstEu3S921NBFptHebFqiFFs9UnQ97JMDWu_2x8sFPbRybvs5QcVTr4I3V6Mzqbmkn5OBReER1Ddn0vAXfH6gxcwL7dB9sgmlH21pI9-OrCAvUyGNQq_6qLIvmPJrsk6Hg_y5GYbWitcn-FBkR2ET3SqC6QvqDXi4l1UDeazm4cHDUk77V2mY_SD4dTpfqdvXPVZn-OKtAK-qvGP75a3w1BEMN4dmB0dSJhV_oZBLjjaT3CjEBQDs1GJqXdLmEWQv_T4-jNC-6SSngMZh7QME2vt80ufh1EbPR318Y1fINt33ZPqS0LMRFqsBDTP9fSS7XcxOahkUBcOeFagbYEymrut8V2OBoN_gs4d851DThzCoF54d7Wvxf1N0cTp_SMjNB60zVfIiwIyclUYAx_qOemtQtaOctZTLJ_Yi77HhiAQBLjFNxAHElhnHjkiNC8%3D)

[**FIGHT FOR CHANGE IN CONGRESS >> CHIP IN TO HELP ELECT MARC MOLINARO**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e454fde173544ca49bf4a08ae92be300&_e=nIuteeK-FbXG2ANnRuN5WQ9edsKdxC6wLrWZnop4JXRTpstEu3S921NBFptHebFqiFFs9UnQ97JMDWu_2x8sFPbRybvs5QcVTr4I3V6Mzqbmkn5OBReER1Ddn0vAXfH6gxcwL7dB9sgmlH21pI9-OrCAvUyGNQq_6qLIvmPJrsk6Hg_y5GYbWitcn-FBkR2ET3SqC6QvqDXi4l1UDeazm4cHDUk77V2mY_SD4dTpfqdvXPVZn-OKtAK-qvGP75a3skOGlfdeyPYwiMGQ9FYzmnVw9gab-dw2jBt8xjnFJ6VhENNNM-TZkMIBUonFUi_u_awCX6aFHV04O-dXpCV5L0S31gL4KdbDBPcGefGzEuzsSTweA2VXSzRf51gGxNfC87agylq7HZvglp7bflHG-agNYd_td84IPp0yIV_Un9-m0LnHh2RXu_BGqov8X0j5_rMkGHufTcn0Mow12EYgPT6s3xr8MepXKxGVGETfCiY%3D)
I know we just had Christmas, but securing a future for our children and our grandchildren is the most important thing we can give to this nation. But, to do that [**we have to take action.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e454fde173544ca49bf4a08ae92be300&_e=nIuteeK-FbXG2ANnRuN5WQ9edsKdxC6wLrWZnop4JXRTpstEu3S921NBFptHebFqiFFs9UnQ97JMDWu_2x8sFPbRybvs5QcVTr4I3V6Mzqbmkn5OBReER1Ddn0vAXfH6gxcwL7dB9sgmlH21pI9-OrCAvUyGNQq_6qLIvmPJrsk6Hg_y5GYbWitcn-FBkR2ET3SqC6QvqDXi4l1UDeazm4cHDUk77V2mY_SD4dTpfqdvXPVZn-OKtAK-qvGP75a3FlQmbsZYjfqGHUyQRMR0ucfaVxD-pAL-lg8zg_bnip0Rfn6PBj-Fuv0pPuXhT-28ZSGHVBNGFyDi9OLtnPUIgc5EJDTaLjMU-G3BVCTsC8yQVa2FYWemcKCqWsOFC8jcJicUWzKoZPRZYdybdhdg8ae2s5ADWqRZ2aIMaomMBpnlLaRH2GHpYG12xk8-NatpOvyGul_K5XAJKUn4hBHFhkbiqesbn1qHZgDe7erVH10%3D)

**We have to show up at the polls, we have to support change, and we have to win back a Congress that is run by the people and for the people,** [**are you with me Peter?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e454fde173544ca49bf4a08ae92be300&_e=nIuteeK-FbXG2ANnRuN5WQ9edsKdxC6wLrWZnop4JXRTpstEu3S921NBFptHebFqiFFs9UnQ97JMDWu_2x8sFPbRybvs5QcVTr4I3V6Mzqbmkn5OBReER1Ddn0vAXfH6gxcwL7dB9sgmlH21pI9-OrCAvUyGNQq_6qLIvmPJrsk6Hg_y5GYbWitcn-FBkR2ET3SqC6QvqDXi4l1UDeazm4cHDUk77V2mY_SD4dTpfqdvXPVZn-OKtAK-qvGP75a3j9lR0Cdme2N-Z280qAW5i35iGdrnjcYTZx50UMmEVPMiJN8THT0zyPdc-GeQkCC5WcxEbNGwuFAFcGJ2ZMZaBKSZBOuRHZgBp_tRfwMD7nsz4ye2Aw6w71fJ5twdQqc41Q-RN4wMznI3wXTw6G4cyPwLxOlSIkaxx_8GdwEM4oQO2K1-2TDJp_WDlnd7rToj3XOpvo3pXqqbVLw9fmz-q3TVmFmqrTEM-BvgTk7rmE4%3D)

Thank you,

clean_body: Peter, midterms are here, and I need your help. | Peter, I know things have been all over the place these past two years, especially with Covid and politics. Regardless of all of that, the opportunity to make some changes in D.C. is finally here, the Midterm Elections. I know we still have months before the primaries and the general election, but we have to start taking action now if we’re going to make sure those changes we need finally come to Capitol Hill. I know we just had Christmas, but securing a future for our children and our grandchildren is the most important thing we can give to this nation. But, to do that We have to show up at the polls, we have to support change, and we have to win back a Congress that is run by the people and for the people, I know winning isn’t always everything, but when it comes to our nation, failure is not an option. The choice is yours. Thank you, Marc Molinaro Candidate, NY 19th Congressional District | | Paid for by Marc for US

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Maryland for Gerrymandered Congressional Districts – Voters Challenge Unconstitutional Plan
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a lawsuit on behalf of 12 registered Maryland voters who object to Maryland’s 2021 congressional redistricting plan on the grounds that it diminishes their rights to participate in elections for the U.S. Congress on an equal basis with other Maryland voters, in violation of the Maryland Constitution.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 3, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57546&L=26523&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1tZC1nZXJyeW1hbmRlcmluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Judicial Watch Sues Maryland for Gerrymandered Congressional Districts – Voters Challenge Unconstitutional Plan](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57546&L=26523&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1tZC1nZXJyeW1hbmRlcmluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** The lawsuit relates that a bipartisan commission recommended a map to Maryland Governor Larry Hogan on November 5 that he approved, but the legislature passed a different proposal in a straight party-line vote. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a lawsuit on behalf of 12 registered Maryland voters who object to Maryland’s 2021 congressional redistricting plan on the grounds that it diminishes their rights to participate in elections for the U.S. Congress on an equal basis with other Maryland voters, in violation of the Maryland Constitution. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 3, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | The lawsuit relates that a bipartisan commission recommended a map to Maryland Governor Larry Hogan on November 5 that he approved, but the legislature passed a different proposal in a straight party-line vote. On December 9, 2021, Hogan vetoed this proposal, and, the same day, the state legislature overrode his veto on another party-line vote. ---|--- | | | | | In its appeal, Judicial Watch highlighted how the Justice Department was undermining the FOIA reforms passed into law Congress under the FOIA Improvements Act in 2016 that “established a new, heightened standard of proof that agencies must meet when making discretionary withholdings of records requested under FOIA. Congress intended the FIA to shore up FOIA, not preserve a years-long, unsatisfactory status quo of ‘withhold-it-because-you-want-to’ exemptions and ‘knee-jerk secrecy.’” ---|--- | | | | | “It took six months and a federal lawsuit to confirm that our embassy in Beijing was concerned about the Chinese government’s invasive anal swab and other COVID testing of our diplomatic personnel – and that as many as two people were asked to submit to a test,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Our diplomatic personnel were harassed in a reprehensible way by the Chinese government, and the Biden administration seems to have done little in response – except to cover it up.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch is fighting to “force the release of Joe Biden’s Senate records,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton states in the Weekly Update. “Given the public interest in these records, the public financing of the University of Delaware under Delaware law, we thought these records should’ve been public,” Fitton adds. ---|--- | | | Judicial Watch Synthetic opioids, primarily illicitly manufactured fentanyl, appear to be the primary driver of the increases in overdose deaths. The DEA discloses that Mexican cartels have established clandestine laboratories in Mexico for the synthesis of fentanyl, and Mexican authorities have encountered a rise in illegal fentanyl pill press and tableting operations. == The Washington Examiner The doctor will be making at least $350,000 per year after he leaves his job as director of the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases at the National Institutes of Health. Fauci could have retired in 2005 but stayed in his job, which is now paying $434,312 a year, the highest of any federal employee, including President Joe Biden. == The Daily Caller Emails recently obtained by Judicial Watch show how U.S. officials scrambled over reports that the Chinese government was requiring anal swab tests to prevent the spread of COVID-19. == == == == | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

# You're Invited this Friday!
---
| Tell all your friends within driving distance! THIS FRIDAY - We're getting together for an event and fundraiser at the Sports Page Cafe in Sandwich. I'll be there and so will sports great, Chicago Bear Super Bowl Champion and owner of the Sports Page, Kurt Becker! It's going to be a fun night of politics, sports and good friends. You'll also hear how having the right candidates when we take back the House will make huge strides towards securing the blessings of liberty, security, prosperity and smaller, less intrusive government! Start your weekend another step closer to replacing Lauren Underwood! Will you join in the fun? I hope to see you Friday! Sincerely, Jim Marter

Brian

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Together, we will keep up the fight for a better future in 2022.
#

Hi,
Before we get too far into 2022, I wanted to pause for a moment to say thank you for your support in 2021.
The past year has been a difficult time for many. But over and over again, I have seen Californians come together to help each other.
From the doctors and health workers who led a historic vaccination effort, to the teachers and parents who helped our kids return to the classroom. From the firefighters who bravely face danger to protect our communities, to the farmworkers who put food on America’s tables. I’m honored to fight for each of you every day in the United States Senate.
Everyone deserves a safe community, with good schools, clean air, and an opportunity to prosper — that is the California Dream. Together, we will keep up the fight for a better future in 2022.
Whether you are donating, or volunteering, or adding your name to endorse our campaign — every action you take makes a big difference. And I want you to know that I’m so grateful for everything you contribute to this team.
Thank you again,
Alex Padilla
* * *
If you’re able, please consider making a donation to help keep our grassroots campaign going.
We need to keep up the pace in 2022, and anything you can afford to give now will go a long way towards getting us off to a strong start.

clean_body: Together, we will keep up the fight for a better future in 2022. Hi, Before we get too far into 2022, I wanted to pause for a moment to say thank you for your support in 2021. The past year has been a difficult time for many. But over and over again, I have seen Californians come together to help each other. From the doctors and health workers who led a historic vaccination effort, to the teachers and parents who helped our kids return to the classroom. From the firefighters who bravely face danger to protect our communities, to the farmworkers who put food on America’s tables. I’m honored to fight for each of you every day in the United States Senate. Everyone deserves a safe community, with good schools, clean air, and an opportunity to prosper — that is the California Dream. Together, we will keep up the fight for a better future in 2022. name: Erica Smith
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey,

Happy New Year! 🎆

I wanted to start the year off by taking a moment to share how grateful I
am that you’re a part of our moral movement.

Whether you’ve been here from day one or just joined our movement
yesterday, whether you’ve donated a little, a lot, once, multiple times,
signed a petition, volunteered, or just opened every email we’ve sent,
you’re an important part of our community and team.

I see you, I appreciate you, and I’m fighting for you. If you’re here it
means that you have the same goals as me. You want to see a North Carolina
— and a country — where working families are uplifted and supported with
policies that don’t just work for the top 1%. We need sustainable climate
policy, universal healthcare, cancellation of student loan debt, an
expansion of broadband access, and so much more.

I’m fully prepared to hit the ground running in 2022 and fight for all of
that and more. We’re up against big Republican forces like Madison
Cawthorn and Sandy Smith — but thanks to your support, I’m more than ready to fight back and
win.

I can’t wait to see all the powerful things we accomplish together in
2022. We’re going to protect this seat against Republican gerrymandering,
and ensure we send progressive representation to the U.S. House.

Together,

Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220103-736-footer&t=1001&refcode2=736_3698_eJwHlE&akid=736%2E3698%2EeJwHlE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=736%2E3698%2EeJwHlE

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Greg Abbott's record of failure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Texans deserve better than the policies and politics of Greg Abbott.
#
**Governor Greg Abbott is hurting the people of Texas.**
[If you're ready to fire Abbott and elect Beto O'Rourke to serve ALL the people of Texas, please consider chipping in $3 or more now. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51512?refcode=ema20220103-169873&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=169873%2E444211%2Ec8HoSF)
Instead of listening to the people he serves, Abbott has focused on advancing the agendas of his donors and keeping himself in power — regardless of the cost to the rest of us.
**Just take a look at his record:**
❌ Abbott abandoned Texas when the electrical grid failed, leaving millions without power and killing over 700 Texans during February's deadly winter storm.
❌ Abbott ignored science and public health advice, enacting policies to ban mask and vaccine requirements.
❌ Abbott failed to protect vulnerable Texans from Covid-19 leading to our state having the most children hospitalized with Covid once again.
❌ Abbott signed a bill into law that allows anyone to carry a loaded gun in public with no background check or training.
❌ Abbott signed into law the most extreme anti-choice, anti-women's health care bill in the country, which bans most abortions after six weeks.
❌ Abbott led the effort to restrict voting rights in Texas signing one of the most extreme voter suppression bills in the country into law.
**In comparison, when Beto is our Governor, he will prioritize taking action on the issues most important to Texans.** Beto will work to create an economy that works for everyone, expand Medicaid, and ensure everyone has the opportunity to pursue their education.
**Time and time again Abbott has turned his back on Texans. Beto has what it takes to defeat him, but we'll need your help to turn out a historic number of voters this year.[Please, will you donate $3 or more right now to elect new leadership in Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51512?refcode=ema20220103-169873&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=169873%2E444211%2Ec8HoSF)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51512?refcode=ema20220103-169873&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=169873%2E444211%2Ec8HoSF)**
Imagine if we had a Governor who believed in listening to the people who elected him. Who understood that Texas communities often already know what solutions they need — they just need someone to take action. A Governor who serves the people of Texas instead of special interests and corporate donors.
**Texans deserve better than the policies and politics of Greg Abbott. We need a leader like Beto.**
But in order to win, we'll need to compete with Abbott’s $55 million campaign cash on hand. That's why every donation — no matter the amount — goes directly to keeping Beto on the road meeting folks in every part of Texas. clean_body: Texans deserve better than the policies and politics of Greg Abbott. Governor Greg Abbott is hurting the people of Texas. Instead of listening to the people he serves, Abbott has focused on advancing the agendas of his donors and keeping himself in power — regardless of the cost to the rest of us. Just take a look at his record: ❌ Abbott abandoned Texas when the electrical grid failed, leaving millions without power and killing over 700 Texans during February's deadly winter storm. ❌ Abbott ignored science and public health advice, enacting policies to ban mask and vaccine requirements. ❌ Abbott failed to protect vulnerable Texans from Covid-19 leading to our state having the most children hospitalized with Covid once again. ❌ Abbott signed a bill into law that allows anyone to carry a loaded gun in public with no background check or training. ❌ Abbott signed into law the most extreme anti-choice, anti-women's health care bill in the country, which bans most abortions after six weeks. ❌ Abbott led the effort to restrict voting rights in Texas signing one of the most extreme voter suppression bills in the country into law. In comparison, when Beto is our Governor, he will prioritize taking action on the issues most important to Texans. Beto will work to create an economy that works for everyone, expand Medicaid, and ensure everyone has the opportunity to pursue their education. Time and time again Abbott has turned his back on Texans. Beto has what it takes to defeat him, but we'll need your help to turn out a historic number of voters this year. Imagine if we had a Governor who believed in listening to the people who elected him. Who understood that Texas communities often already know what solutions they need — they just need someone to take action. A Governor who serves the people of Texas instead of special interests and corporate donors. Texans deserve better than the policies and politics of Greg Abbott. We need a leader like Beto. But in order to win, we'll need to compete with Abbott’s $55 million campaign cash on hand. That's why every donation — no matter the amount — goes directly to keeping Beto on the road meeting folks in every part of Texas. Let's do this, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

I want to bring that spirit back to our nation | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fcb82d089b2c4f07bc9efe95f1d3570b&_e=_3Qg1JzE_GkTvn0TBK_cAVerg2U2Zl9XgXzJvToDl1TwYWSmFeGMXdkRIo4veAtYVPbgUyAZXkfrJyoTPiw_v1-ka51Y2ta8T13dwYoMh48pQeVsBO1_LSwXZKtZ_FG1qJA8A1-RZNzuBRyHFUewPxre6myIgSpS4bOascNxACa2zuMthQ_J_TRHNFK3gqfVNayUhAA7EurKG4GO1BjxzE-Vufo8ivSmEMeazScqdTAlipsGmeAfn7nC2pEz4b142XnanPeLQY2GKmk196htBwTbv7oqjgC159IDF-UvNojeDFo5yliOQHTliiqqJDTgDwNMq-o4Q_v7FrxEc50xx_-lAqAoBZr2_NJhJx6rw8nFywxCv4U1fgg-6cVBlzLiXcklK6kHqGEgknimP54cgwnhtjzmWMvK0UGPy7FL9aI%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative

I'm Blake Masters. I grew up in Tucson. My wife Catherine and I homeschool our three boys. I've had a successful business career. I was honored to serve on President Trump's transition team. **And now I'm running to represent Arizona in the U.S. Senate.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fcb82d089b2c4f07bc9efe95f1d3570b&_e=_3Qg1JzE_GkTvn0TBK_cAVerg2U2Zl9XgXzJvToDl1TwYWSmFeGMXdkRIo4veAtYVPbgUyAZXkfrJyoTPiw_v1-ka51Y2ta8T13dwYoMh48pQeVsBO1_LSwXZKtZ_FG1qJA8A1-RZNzuBRyHFUewPxre6myIgSpS4bOascNxACa2zuMthQ_J_TRHNFK3gqfVNayUhAA7EurKG4GO1BjxzGTe84XA5HU37UkHi9szQga_1iNwwffbz6D2Q2Zp9x1yNELfZIPiwieJu8nU3I6JiesRk5mf2NTCobpn74tXGz3K0B5VCvJpX6NIAOX-9zp60LblV7v3K68YEIQMkVeCWQgSiblPNQt9A2spdC0Vvkt5keINkEL-jBUY3XDqsJaX-EbWb1LnBf4TlNaGxK2-vNxwZij2kuG9PL9l-K7JUlc%3D)

The America I grew up in was optimistic, but today, we are losing. **For the first time, this generation expects to be worse off than our parents.**

Our leaders have taken America for granted and put us in a position that makes it almost impossible to succeed. It's time for a new generation of bold and confident leadership, not lame politicians who are constantly on the defense.

**Today, our jobs are being shipped off to China, public schools are indoctrination factories, and our president left the southern border wide open for anyone to cross.**

[** ****RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fcb82d089b2c4f07bc9efe95f1d3570b&_e=_3Qg1JzE_GkTvn0TBK_cAVerg2U2Zl9XgXzJvToDl1TwYWSmFeGMXdkRIo4veAtYVPbgUyAZXkfrJyoTPiw_v1-ka51Y2ta8T13dwYoMh48pQeVsBO1_LSwXZKtZ_FG1qJA8A1-RZNzuBRyHFUewPxre6myIgSpS4bOascNxACa2zuMthQ_J_TRHNFK3gqfVNayUhAA7EurKG4GO1BjxzLNrsaOm2-q3UiQbWNFkmL6R4XC8Z8wSgDDnOd3T187pKZ6HNc2pknG1U6nXpm5jOuvg136CPnFLqDBioxzcCeaR018s-EhDimTAzahsiBkaiHzez6YcGqBJNGGavzjLYmgUyS7_r12uADwL3bdmNbGeCS76uVabJ3jH2iB5Q89KePIFJBSRAhinaAJrzqQs4eMBX4rB4b7Mrgvtjwfjp7Q%3D)
Arizona needs someone who will enforce the laws, close the border, advocate for our students, **_and most importantly,_ put America first every day.**

My opponent, Democrat Senator Mark Kelly, went to Washington D.C. saying he would fight for Arizona, but he's become nothing more than a stale rubber stamp for the Biden Administration.

This country used to work, and now it doesn't. Only an outsider can fix it. [**Can you help me take back Arizona take back the Republican majority by contributing $10 or $20 to my campaign today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fcb82d089b2c4f07bc9efe95f1d3570b&_e=_3Qg1JzE_GkTvn0TBK_cAVerg2U2Zl9XgXzJvToDl1TwYWSmFeGMXdkRIo4veAtYVPbgUyAZXkfrJyoTPiw_v1-ka51Y2ta8T13dwYoMh48pQeVsBO1_LSwXZKtZ_FG1qJA8A1-RZNzuBRyHFUewPxre6myIgSpS4bOascNxACa2zuMthQ_J_TRHNFK3gqfVNayUhAA7EurKG4GO1BjxzGUV-VoL8XIN9ahuH86efkrEEH5hd86WDodHEk2ZKmcaA-yU-c2XstjWWR5clXypmk_Lm7ECW8XM8FueSpbQpUbB7WVgJpL5gVxMiy0YUUcJjRfop2g0rchHEKjjaKcrWxeA23UEiFhdm0e6nnChV6PHBupBtSLQ_yhQmGVsavbJJjT8IHw0htQZmFjJjYUtgIgCwKiUmZw7iYl16Gd0XAY%3D)

[** ****RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fcb82d089b2c4f07bc9efe95f1d3570b&_e=_3Qg1JzE_GkTvn0TBK_cAVerg2U2Zl9XgXzJvToDl1TwYWSmFeGMXdkRIo4veAtYVPbgUyAZXkfrJyoTPiw_v1-ka51Y2ta8T13dwYoMh48pQeVsBO1_LSwXZKtZ_FG1qJA8A1-RZNzuBRyHFUewPxre6myIgSpS4bOascNxACa2zuMthQ_J_TRHNFK3gqfVNayUhAA7EurKG4GO1BjxzBLjp1C1sLn4uvcfFjzmjrLgNwGuxxZ-h82I2V5ZfYW0vce8BsDGQmhAdRNTGjLmXNxybO3rvyrwaOrIUpgd30A4sS8ne8txZbD4t-JRj1SJ_jXi6-7toWiqpRwUZ3VIM4gTTWrkOP4AICR7GsexwfoLxa4erICQ1XL70sLKkIA7YAOsse6Hl09Hj64yTxg5QNgpbv83iAmhkThiBpZuL6Q%3D)
[**My kids, your kids, your grandkids deserve to grow up in an America that works, and I know we can give it to them. It's not too late.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fcb82d089b2c4f07bc9efe95f1d3570b&_e=_3Qg1JzE_GkTvn0TBK_cAVerg2U2Zl9XgXzJvToDl1TwYWSmFeGMXdkRIo4veAtYVPbgUyAZXkfrJyoTPiw_v1-ka51Y2ta8T13dwYoMh48pQeVsBO1_LSwXZKtZ_FG1qJA8A1-RZNzuBRyHFUewPxre6myIgSpS4bOascNxACa2zuMthQ_J_TRHNFK3gqfVNayUhAA7EurKG4GO1BjxzMYKoV_0qQ1g_wOhVuF9xtjT8Re-Jj9an0RV-oqMsbP1siV6DK9IfSeXP8iPoQBERWww1bLhY24_kHU5MXhWb3jjROAdJ134N9Saxsx8MqH1_oZUSCAzUDYeJXT6HpeddjDsmdG7PwV5ptIDhGke8jrkJ_r0IIbsAAy4E5PAf-_V3xEFFx_7XLoKfVQf6iOw2n_7SwiQIr3Js6OXgt0-WPk%3D)

Thank you,

**Blake Masters**
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

| | **Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: "open"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, reports are
saying, again, that Joe Manchin is willing to negotiate on Build Back
Better. But do you see what we see?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88664?refcode=em20220103-21308&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21308%2E1203867%2EY3gPIf ]Tweet from Axios reads SCOOP: Sen. Joe Manchin is open to reengaging on
the climate and child care provisions in Biden's Build Back Better agenda,
people familiar with the matter tell Axios.

It’s ridiculous that the biggest piece of legislation in Congress since
Democrats took majorities in the House and Senate, and won the White
House, is STILL being stalled by conservative Democrats. And it’s
ridiculous that Manchin is merely "open" to "reengage" on critical
cornerstone issues like child care and climate.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88664?refcode=em20220103-21308&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21308%2E1203867%2EY3gPIf ]We need a Democratic Party that will do whatever it takes to fight
climate change and expand the social safety net. That’s our fight, and we
need your help. Can you chip in $3 so we can defeat
conservatives and corporate interests in order to deliver for the people?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88664?refcode=em20220103-21308&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21308%2E1203867%2EY3gPIf ]Contribute $3

When it comes down to it, the corporate-backed Democratic Party is
dragging their feet on passing popular progressive policies. Democrats
passed a bipartisan infrastructure bill with Republicans even though they
knew it would jeopardize universal pre-K, lowering drug costs, child care
subsidies, and the fight against climate change.

Now, Democrats see how their votes to appease corporations are impacting
even modest reforms: The Child Tax Credit and expanded ACA subsidies are
about to expire, climate change continues to threaten our lives, and a
range of other issues continue to impact peoples’ day-to-day lives.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88664?refcode=em20220103-21308&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21308%2E1203867%2EY3gPIf ]It’s on the Justice Democrats in Congress — and the grassroots
movement behind them — to continue fighting to upend the status quo in
Washington and deliver for the people. Can you chip in $3
to help fuel our fight?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21308%2E1203867%2EY3gPIf ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21308%2E1203867%2EY3gPIf ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220103-21308-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21308_1203867_Y3gPIf&akid=21308%2E1203867%2EY3gPIf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=21308%2E1203867%2EY3gPIf

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
The trends are moving in our direction. Gretchen Whitmer is in trouble and she knows it. | | | |

| | |
#### 2022
# My Commitment to You
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter:

It’s here. 2022. The year Gretchen Whitmer is defeated.

The trends are moving in our direction. If you haven’t seen the polling or the predictions, Michigan has moved from "lean Democrat" to a "toss up." Gretchen Whitmer is in trouble and she knows it.

That’s why she’s already trying to buy off voters.

What she doesn’t understand is that Michigan citizens are smarter than that.

I’m campaigning hard to defeat her, and here’s my commitment to you (click on the video to watch).
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=dd2efe4f3a&e=0636b97700)
---
| Please help us defeat Gretchen Whitmer. Now’s the time. There are so many ways you can help.

Sign up to [volunteer](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f1930e03af&e=0636b97700). We need all hands on deck.

Tell your friends and neighbors.

Post about us on Social Media.

[Make a donation](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=a7a89f3beb&e=0636b97700). Any amount helps.

Thank you for your support. Together we can win this election and Fix Michigan.

>From the campaign trail,

Michael Brown
Conservative Republican for Governor

name: Team Heller
subject: are you serious?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
The 2022 midterm elections are going to be a tipping point in the conservative movement to take back our country from the radical Left. | |
---

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=6ba1dfdf235d473ea1f30b9b377a2c48&_e=UbHbAT3HqDNMGxrat5UTb-lSMdCShzBM6MR30u_dnfg9RzsMK33u8EYOU5vW_hspmf5Md8sdabNcywQQlGX0DbTqNQnPwUyRyrFWaNR58yZB1Wb_ViYbG2_bqMFcQSfcuuV7iiWkUR6wJY5T6bFMm_4AjoTlhzGjQ8HZgA_OA-yYbdOxU6oh80gUAzdwtXGsqT2EfctqQDD2piDantSJAvHCsBAa1XNrbmU8wpOrzzsGJ7nPHvYGAd-Kz4_V8ZYw3flpsHP4-LjeG4HUTktbHgf-6YBV42XEyXcrHve3oQ-v0Uz7eRraXnVzv0feDEqQRpXZYdik-iLVhmqKzoGcKf01kbbI6pz_qvzVx_IfkSTIClgC_9vfBKRdeUaj89gIauOREnx_XGCEjtEaAExzZQ4cUA6sa3p4ClzOdj23VtMpUZY2cugwTT0LGrziTRo5w930QcAXzQ6XALLl4narqt6NrIm1kOp6fonkFCRb7hEArZVAEL9I8ol5XZo_RWQL)

|
---
Welcome to 2022, Peter.

It’s time to start laying the groundwork for the RED WAVE that will hit on election day in November.

Thanks to your support, Dean is _SURGING_ in the polls and we have all the momentum heading into this election year.

The 2022 midterm elections are going to be a tipping point in the conservative movement to take back our country from the radical Left.

That’s why we need every single person who supports Dean’s vision for a better Nevada to make a commitment.

Take the 2022 Election Year Pledge and commit to standing up for freedom and liberty.

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Thank you and Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I hope you and your loved ones have a joyful and safe new year.
#

Happy New Year!
Now that 2022 is finally here, we’ve closed the books on our FEC deadline, and from the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you.
The outpouring of support we've received since Democrats united behind our campaign just a few short weeks ago has been overwhelming.
Curt, Thomas, Matthew and I are all deeply grateful to everyone on this team for helping us get our campaign off to a strong start in 2021.
Our team is still crunching the numbers from our latest deadline, but we’ll share them with you as soon as we have them. I can confidently say that we are going to send an unmistakable message that Democrats in North Carolina are fired up and ready to flip this seat.
The road ahead of us won't be easy of course, but as long as we stand together, we have what it takes to win this race and make real progress for our families — on voting rights, reproductive freedom, a living wage and the ability to retire with dignity, climate change and so much more.
Thanks to you, I have faith this will be the year we flip this seat and make history in North Carolina. We’ll finally give working people across our state a voice in the Senate.
So thank you again. For everything. From our family to yours, we hope you and your loved ones have a joyful and safe new year.
\- Cheri, Curt, Thomas, Matthew, and Stanley
P.S. Make sure you are keeping up with our campaign on social media @CheriBeasleyNC! We appreciate all the help we can get amplifying our message:
**[FOLLOW US ON FACEBOOK](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/45?t=1&akid=230%2E357359%2EutAwX5)**
**[FOLLOW US ON TWITTER](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/46?t=2&akid=230%2E357359%2EutAwX5)**
**[FOLLOW US ON INSTAGRAM](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/47?t=3&akid=230%2E357359%2EutAwX5)**
You can also sign up to help our campaign organize voters across North Carolina in 2022 at **[CheriBeasley.com/Volunteer](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/323?t=4&akid=230%2E357359%2EutAwX5)**!
**[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/62?t=5&akid=230%2E357359%2EutAwX5)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=230%2E357359%2EutAwX5). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=230%2E357359%2EutAwX5). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=230_357359_utAwX5&akid=230%2E357359%2EutAwX5) today to help us make history.

name: Blake Masters
subject: The America I grew up in was optimistic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
I want to bring that spirit back to our nation | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=211b8df05b924d7abd1049ffa31cfba9&_e=19aM3kegrHUfWHVRBBnkzYNFAorQode7ajkle68NlHJiRTsWBHfOZ2J_bd2wsm0dFFL9R2aD8MBeVv87Nyp5mvLq7RKbU7svKcTBdOH57CYh3I4s4BbvzYsi-J0wu9dMmfwp8DcUaOQY7uAUjyqWQX2sf1OVch5jPGu-CqzwSohdpi2yF1BN6g4VbzuMybLzBNapBRC3_I5pmLxAR-FaojiJfiTSvyMHv8ACNRZcygiEpnqd8X2QIXyIBB8mKKuf48JbTTW-tbpZzdhwv63-YXB2ar8Xlf48QMWXVIvFci3oxAPoIYN2gbUJeT1vkhr6BUnjwxp3Og1JdIq8KK1HfuOsoffws8ICgRm9sTu4PfJThU_aMZjBlo3rAgFZHDv1pLZSklOmyDScSXoL5HxciiLG7xlht5hX7okTlzBJ8SPHa5pzz1wzinyYe1Hc6-x-)

---
Fellow Conservative

I'm Blake Masters. I grew up in Tucson. My wife Catherine and I homeschool our three boys. I've had a successful business career. I was honored to serve on President Trump's transition team. **And now I'm running to represent Arizona in the U.S. Senate.**

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=211b8df05b924d7abd1049ffa31cfba9&_e=19aM3kegrHUfWHVRBBnkzYNFAorQode7ajkle68NlHJiRTsWBHfOZ2J_bd2wsm0dFFL9R2aD8MBeVv87Nyp5mvLq7RKbU7svKcTBdOH57CYh3I4s4BbvzYsi-J0wu9dMmfwp8DcUaOQY7uAUjyqWQX2sf1OVch5jPGu-CqzwSohdpi2yF1BN6g4VbzuMybLzBNapBRC3_I5pmLxAR-FaovEMpS6ueZrOjiAno044b0ivgvi_Vf-BAviMiUbeeS2i_NG7UUwXlCAEyg9Ew00Xu76kjIrxISBUrY8Bha0qD6vjLgEB3K-jy7Ep8hJ3JzXPShe3FIKRJ3clr72hbviXoHwB5kZHa2eWYQwbzYz-k68sm3jpT3x7uLrAczUS5eTVHaiOp73pq6E3GLwGCKrLZirutWoSgGOtTGDovG-J3jPVZV8Usj0ow7ZSTG-_GXIO)

The America I grew up in was optimistic, but today, we are losing. **For the first time, this generation expects to be worse off than our parents.**

Our leaders have taken America for granted and put us in a position that makes it almost impossible to succeed. It's time for a new generation of bold and confident leadership, not lame politicians who are constantly on the defense.

**Today, our jobs are being shipped off to China, public schools are indoctrination factories, and our president left the southern border wide open for anyone to cross.**

[** ****RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=211b8df05b924d7abd1049ffa31cfba9&_e=19aM3kegrHUfWHVRBBnkzYNFAorQode7ajkle68NlHJiRTsWBHfOZ2J_bd2wsm0dFFL9R2aD8MBeVv87Nyp5mvLq7RKbU7svKcTBdOH57CYh3I4s4BbvzYsi-J0wu9dMmfwp8DcUaOQY7uAUjyqWQX2sf1OVch5jPGu-CqzwSohdpi2yF1BN6g4VbzuMybLzBNapBRC3_I5pmLxAR-Faohuaj43kNbwKxC8y0z1Ka50MG9MF0MpWrYQoomFVXbPZ90KqiiNDsk2xyIcj0A-ll20nRD6dICLdjmLnKEXrn1y8zJtXM1I8igGNz1heMenAWcvsXrtJ1QRuhyFEncnxU60McCEWUX_gWt0spvfin96UT9dYmKcdzQploL3vTJIitmmPZQ52iphAiYIKCSiVxdRpX0joFqKDFOvmryQJ6R-9iuqlxYqkGSV5IGVoLpGv)
Arizona needs someone who will enforce the laws, close the border, advocate for our students, **_and most importantly,_ put America first every day.**

My opponent, Democrat Senator Mark Kelly, went to Washington D.C. saying he would fight for Arizona, but he's become nothing more than a stale rubber stamp for the Biden Administration.

This country used to work, and now it doesn't. Only an outsider can fix it. [**Can you help me take back Arizona take back the Republican majority by contributing $10 or $20 to my campaign today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=211b8df05b924d7abd1049ffa31cfba9&_e=19aM3kegrHUfWHVRBBnkzYNFAorQode7ajkle68NlHJiRTsWBHfOZ2J_bd2wsm0dFFL9R2aD8MBeVv87Nyp5mvLq7RKbU7svKcTBdOH57CYh3I4s4BbvzYsi-J0wu9dMmfwp8DcUaOQY7uAUjyqWQX2sf1OVch5jPGu-CqzwSohdpi2yF1BN6g4VbzuMybLzBNapBRC3_I5pmLxAR-Faok-1OJd6i90ZVWuI7sP_FnXRkohtpChrvc2XsjJ92YwE_yDa6o2m0ZnbmtZ7JHUqeekmizN_WySHrjMdEQqHmx_iGN7Lk98Dq3SDcGbsxvL8KMnaLeyklsJvVcf50vDPl_U4qT51R2GsY11yrOV4y7QkgJTxPWlogRlcOQ-RhsdgXUeOcUlgogcL6G-SP0dybGHIb1QsNfU4u-Jter_rR_TY_m9AbKU9O6D0R7byDpUU)

[** ****RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=211b8df05b924d7abd1049ffa31cfba9&_e=19aM3kegrHUfWHVRBBnkzYNFAorQode7ajkle68NlHJiRTsWBHfOZ2J_bd2wsm0dFFL9R2aD8MBeVv87Nyp5mvLq7RKbU7svKcTBdOH57CYh3I4s4BbvzYsi-J0wu9dMmfwp8DcUaOQY7uAUjyqWQX2sf1OVch5jPGu-CqzwSohdpi2yF1BN6g4VbzuMybLzBNapBRC3_I5pmLxAR-FaoouYnA1DX-DFxFED1dDoezvVJu3cs0J4bWH0YPOKvzYxuwnkNd7lN2qLaPLo1TDhNS7YlPLh8FK2mN_C80kMGUZNXeUeKXjNaaDMJls_c3LB5gTVb5tBys5GyeJRkmaPgzDqyvn0WFSRpe8xGotM9v-qikM65khNXtWTkqCNTNGVbgAIVyZUVX0Nl-brP80zNzmb32O-gyvJWiJ6948mnQB1Fb2IOxUa3GWIx2huPzkh)
[**My kids, your kids, your grandkids deserve to grow up in an America that works, and I know we can give it to them. It's not too late.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=211b8df05b924d7abd1049ffa31cfba9&_e=19aM3kegrHUfWHVRBBnkzYNFAorQode7ajkle68NlHJiRTsWBHfOZ2J_bd2wsm0dFFL9R2aD8MBeVv87Nyp5mvLq7RKbU7svKcTBdOH57CYh3I4s4BbvzYsi-J0wu9dMmfwp8DcUaOQY7uAUjyqWQX2sf1OVch5jPGu-CqzwSohdpi2yF1BN6g4VbzuMybLzBNapBRC3_I5pmLxAR-Faoq1SLgnkjZWWG4OQQo9-WRKxnp9NA6cLBq-qrd__7j8kusujg9uISfgMXRTOdroNVX0KYR7DRrghntS-zGT58OzHNbIJovok1btRIl2sntmpvClEjf75QuihtPwkBAVx5wgPpCe6j5bOjpLmQqU1KQdnBm6ux5l5ABNjT404v1SGkASXS6DmHrh-QGMk33DxDTgQSirtved9is9LZiZ2J1CvHYkMbtD0Kn78ED3H464p)

Thank you,

**Blake Masters**
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

| | **Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**

[I make these 5 solemn promises to you:](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODU1Mzg2NDk1NTI3OTUwOTA4JmM9djB2NyZlPTAmYj04NTU2OTE5MzQmZD15Mm4zYTVq.UoPzM2TrLsn0NidUMORseLvZIoVsAqVp00AqM_AnYIQ)

| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODU1Mzg2NDk1NTI3OTUwOTA4JmM9djB2NyZlPTAmYj04NTU2OTE5NDAmZD1iM2Q4ajN5.X-BmYyJyTJScEP8ocaAKLyeiaDY6s8D4pZ9Krc5mlec)
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODU1Mzg2NDk1NTI3OTUwOTA4JmM9djB2NyZlPTAmYj04NTU2OTE5NDMmZD1nMGs3ZzZy._N7Ai16-7gTUDFSmrk8apcDQ_MDGuuw0Zb8ZXBHxTKo)
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
My story is similar to the stories of those who know the **American Dream** as more than a cute political talking point. Those of you who have been forged in the _crucible of adversity_ know how important difficulties in life are to **developing character**. Let me share with you what that means to me. First, you must know that the terror of socialism and communism was burned into my psyche from a tender age. My mother, brother, and aunt came to America from Eastern Europe (former Yugoslavia). _They lived under and fled from communism_. Growing up, I listened to stories of how people in other parts of the world lived and I was taught why **America is the greatest nation on Earth.** On my father’s side, my grandmother came to America from National Socialist (Nazi) Germany. Dad heard from my grandfather about the darkness covering Europe and his times in the U.S. Army during WWII. My grandmother has tearfully recounted and taught all of us how her country, along with Europe, was destroyed by socialists and communists. And how America served as a beacon of hope for the world. [CONTINUE READING MY FULL STORY HERE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODU1Mzg2NDk1NTI3OTUwOTA4JmM9djB2NyZlPTAmYj04NTU2OTE5NDYmZD1qMGE4bjd0.yysrbScuSqFurpX3aAZVuUWt_QyQMigXKwamanxmDjI)

---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Principles above politics
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODU1Mzg2NDk1NTI3OTUwOTA4JmM9djB2NyZlPTAmYj04NTU2OTE5NDkmZD13N3Q3bjhs.SQuSO6MYb2COAyqTMj-czlJVJfzM9Z97C7q3pMX2g_8)
---
| |
---
| |
---
## **We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,_growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.**

It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. [Read Full Election Integrity Policy Summary here.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODU1Mzg2NDk1NTI3OTUwOTA4JmM9djB2NyZlPTAmYj04NTU2OTE5NTImZD16NnQ3cjhr.WvAlLUBv-QdN11RIJJc6kz5M5D1I_OrBm6Q6fcJchGs)

---
| |
---
| |
---
| If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow **Patriots.** Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can’t volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

clean_body: | | | Thank you. I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: when I made the decision to run for Congress against Kevin McCarthy, I knew this would be a tough fight. And over the past 11 months, I have been amazed at the support our movement has received. With an average contribution size of $18, from people all across our district, across California, and the country, we have shown that we don’t need to turn to corporate sources in order to build a powerful campaign that fights for the people. When we sit down to budget out our campaign needs for the months ahead, we know we won’t be counting on the millions of dollars that Kevin McCarthy has from corporations and wealthy, extreme right-wing donors. We count on folks like you. That’s why one of the best ways you can help us beat expectations, defeat Kevin McCarthy, and elect better representation for the great people of the Central Valley is by setting up a monthly recurring donation. It can be $1, it can be $5, it can be $10 — whatever the amount, no matter the amount, it’s what allows our campaign to make more strategic decisions — because that’s money we can count on coming in each month. Setting up a recurring donation of a few bucks per month means you will be an even more integral part of this fight. I know we emailed you a lot last month, especially last week. That’s because emails like this one are what help raise the money our movement needs to take on Kevin McCarthy. I can never express how deeply grateful I am to folks like you who have already chipped in and helped us start off 2022 strong. So when you read emails like this, know that it’s because I don’t take folks like you for granted. Together, I know we have the power to defeat one of the most dangerous Republicans in Congress and finally bring better leadership for the people of our district to Washington. I am so grateful for all of the support you gave this movement in 2021. Thank you, Bruno | | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more.
